programme.desc: Lee McKenzie is joined by David Coulthard, Damon Hill, and Ariana Bravo to present action from the second round of the season at Shanghai International Circuit, where McLaren drivers Oscar Piastri and Lando Norris finished first and second last season. While the race itself proved to be relatively uneventful, the aftermath was anything but, with Charles Leclerc of Ferrari and Pierre Gasly of Alpine being disqualified due to their cars being underweight, Leclercs teammate Lewis Hamilton also being disqualified for excessive skid wear, and In the days that followed, Red Bull announcing that Liam Lawson would undergo a driver swap with Racing Bulls Yuki Tsunoda

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first destination of the week is the Horseshoe Hotel in Egton Bridge, North Yorkshire, where a fancy machine causes confusion but breakfast and eco toiletries prove a big hit

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB battle continues in Market Bosworth at the Dixie Arms, run by Alex, whose blingy beds impress two of the guests. However, not all of the facilities are quite as successful

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Bradburys of Blackpool, where former flight attendant Matt is hoping to change his guests perceptions of the seaside town

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to Little Oakhurst, in Stonyhurst near Clitheroe, run by husband-and-wife team Andy and Joanne. The guests are immediately captivated by the stunning location, with views over the Lancashire countryside, though the optional and additional breakfast brings some mixed reviews. At feedback time, it becomes clear that glamping isnt for everyone

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment Day sees Craig and Greta keen to get to the bottom of facilities faults, before Alex points the finger at them about some unsavoury feedback scores. Matt wants to question Alexs cleanliness comments, and Joanne and Andy have some beef over their breakfast scores

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: In Dartmouth, Nigel Cooper sails his steamboat Halcyon along the River Dart for the clubs annual competition. His boat has won twice in the past - can he make it a hat-trick? In Cornwall, farrier and horseman David Jones is hoping his age-old skills will be passed down the line to daughter Myrtle, as they head out to tackle a rampant bracken problem in an old woodland. And in Cornwalls Trebah Gardens, head gardener Darren Dickey embarks on a new project. To celebrate 30 years of the garden becoming a public trust, hes creating a new Victorian-style stumpery with an array of ferns to delight visitors

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Ade Adepitan, Billy Monger, Ed Jackson, Sarah Storey, Sean Rose and Alice Tai present live coverage of the event from Cortina dAmpezzo, as the Paralympic flame is extinguished, signaling the end of the 14th Winter Games. Athletes, artists and spectators from all over the world gather in the Cortina Olympic Curling Stadium to enjoy a spectacular final show. The presenting team look back at all the standout stories and key moments from nine days of elite competition spanning six sports

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on The Capture, Married at First Sight Australia, Louis Theroux: Inside the Manosphere, The Floor, Will and Ralf Should Know Better, Britains Best Mattress: How to Sleep Better and This Morning (AI boyfriend)

programme.title: The Son (2022)
programme.desc: New York lawyer Peter Miller receives a panicked visit from his ex-wife Kate. Their 17-year-old son Nicholas has been playing truant from school for a month. Peter allows Nicholas to move in with him but the teenager continues to suffer, unable to articulate the darkness that consumes him. Drama, starring Hugh Jackman, Vanessa Kirby and Anthony Hopkins

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Los Angeles to help La Frite, an outdated French restaurant that is failing to make any profits. His first step is to try to reconcile the feuding family members who run the business, and so devises a plan to bring them together by using secret filming

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa tries to persuade her family not to take part in the towns annual snake-clubbing ritual, but her words fall on deaf ears as Homer anticipates the event with glee. With the guest voice of Barry White

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Long-standing TV personality Krusty the Clown reaches the end of the road, his days of entertaining kids quashed by an alternative show - prompting his famous friends to come to the rescue. Animation, with the voices of Elizabeth Taylor, Hugh Hefner, Bette Midler and the Red Hot Chili Peppers

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Cambridge, the first hosts are 23-year-old stable owner Alice and her feisty boyfriend Ollie, who reveals that he helped to hunt and butcher the deer theyre serving for their main course. Travel specialists Gareth and Hihine try to throw a more civilised evening, based around a generations-old family Asian menu. On the last night, John and Katy aim to spread the love among the group by serving up the same menu that they had for their wedding six weeks earlier, while John wears his wedding suit and Katy wears half her wedding dress

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: Keith and Marj focus on the last thing they need to do to finally call Capel Salem home: bringing the bedroom inside the building! Marj gilds a vintage French mirror, while Keith takes on storage solutions and they both reflect on their journey so far by visiting a Welsh love spoon workshop

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer assist two couples in their search for homes in Hertfordshire. Newly engaged accountants Liz and Neil are hoping to raise a family near the town of Tring, while in St Albans, married couple David and Claire want to find a place where they can finally settle down, after moving house five times in five years

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Part one of two. Frasier is devastated to learn Lilith has betrayed him with a colleague, while Sam hires a bouncer. Bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson and Kelsey Grammer

programme.sub-title: The Girl in the Plastic Bubble
programme.desc: Lilith tells Frasier she plans to spend a year in a biosphere with her lover - leaving the traumatised psychiatrist teetering precariously on a window ledge. Bar-room comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Bebe Neuwirth

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: As a challenge, Ray writes a moving eulogy for Frank - despite the obvious fact he is still alive. Ray Romano and Peter Boyle star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray thinks something is wrong and confides in Debra when he has a miserable night with his friends, but an invitation to join Frank for a steam bath restores his spirits. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Peter Boyle

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra give Robert $1,000 to help him out of dire financial straits - but he takes advantage of their generosity by jetting off for a holiday in Las Vegas

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Samantha ends her relationship with Frasier on their return from a seemingly perfect weekend away, leaving him desperate to find out where he went wrong. However, Niles helps him realise that he only liked his new woman for her famous friends. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.desc: A story about the holiday season is told from the perspectives of Daphne, Niles, Martin and Roz as the Crane family prepares for Christmas. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, John Mahoney and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Where Every Bloke Knows Your Name
programme.desc: A British theme pub becomes Frasiers favourite new haunt - much to the annoyance of Daphne, who is already a regular and dislikes having to share the place with her boss. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink has to choose whether to return to his heartless former agent Bebe, or stick with his current representative, well-meaning but ineffectual Ben. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.desc: The fiery chef tries to help the owners of Iberville Cuisine and Oyster Bar, in the heart of the French Quarter in New Orleans. programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary

programme.desc: Renovation rookies Angie and Ash dream big in the Italian Alps. In France, neighbours Aggi and Camille join forces to turn around a derelict restaurants fortunes. Sparks fly in Portugal, as Anglo-American couple Harriet and Mondo fight to boost business at their holiday cottages

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Teaching assistant Michelle hosts the first party from Bedfordshire and Cambridgeshire, hoping to share her Portuguese and American heritage as well as dishes from Italy

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Batch from Scratch: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: Suzanne Mulholland and Joe Swash help a single mother in Aberdeen, who is struggling to get her kids into healthy eating habits, regularly prepares multiple meals, and often doesnt have time to sit down at the table to eat herself. Suzanne and Joe create a plan to cut costs, reduce sugar, simplify dinnertimes and get everyone involved, kids included

programme.title: Handcuffed: Last Pair Standing
programme.desc: With the final getting ever closer, the handcuffed couples face a new challenge: their first holiday away together. Jonathan Ross sends them across the UK on iconic British breaks, from beautiful canal trips to camping in the wild countryside, and enjoying all the fun of the fair at the great British seaside. On neutral territory, and without friends and family around, how do they cope with just their cuff-partner for company?

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Sisters Caitlin and Lucy have never been in a romantic relationship with a guy. They decide to visit the restaurant to each take a dive into dating. Naked cleaner Elleigha is confident in everything - except romance. Shes matched with head chef Louis, a man searching for a wild connection with someone with strong opinions. Aspiring erotic-fiction-writer Immogen also attends, finally ready to live out her passions in real life

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Sarah from Plymouth becomes the first returning picker having previously been on the show as David. Now proudly pansexual and living as a woman, Sarah cant wait to road test her new body and hopes her first date as a woman will be everything she has dreamed of. Twenty-year-old plumber Jamie from Swansea is fed up with being hit on by OAPs at work, he comes into the studio looking for love

programme.title: The Eclipse
programme.desc: Mystery drama set in the Aubrac region of France, focusing on events taking place in the picturesque village of Bozouls. The community is buzzing with activity. Manue and Johanna, both gendarmes, get together for the big party to celebrate the eclipse. However tragedy strikes when Nour, the daughter of new rural settlers, disappears after a terrible accident. Manue and Johanna investigate the disappearance, which involves their children. With Anne Charrier, Claire Keim and Hubert Delattre. In French

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Brenda Blethyn and Jessica Reynolds star in this drama based on the bestseller by Barbara Taylor Bradford, charting a womans rise from maid to businesswoman. In early 1900s Yorkshire, ambitious maid Emma Harte dreams of escaping Fairley Hall for a better life, but is caught up in a forbidden romance with Edwin Fairley, son of the master of the house. In 1970s New York, the worlds richest woman is warned that a plot is brewing to take away the empire she has worked so hard to build. With Ewan Horrocks, Will Mellor, Leanne Best and Lydia Leonard

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: As housemaid Emma and young master Edwin fall deeper in love, she struggles to see how they can overcome their class differences. Meanwhile, Adam and Olivia continue their own love affair as Adeles erratic behaviour and paranoia worsen. In the 1970s, 80-year-old Emma reckons with her childrens plan to oust her from the Harte empire - unaware of a secret romance blossoming between her protegee granddaughter Paula and Jim Fairley. Starring Jessica Reynolds and Brenda Blethyn

programme.desc: Joey turns up in Las Vegas to start filming his first movie role, only to receive disappointing news. Phoebe racks her brains to remember why she hates Ross so much

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One in Vegas - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. The pals visit Las Vegas, where they find surprises galore awaiting them. Meanwhile, Ross misinterprets Rachels intentions and embarks on a campaign of public humiliation against her - but discovers she is more than a match for him

programme.title: Beethovens 2nd (1993)
programme.desc: The slobbering St Bernard is now grown up and in love with his beautiful sweetheart Missy. Together they bring a litter of puppies into the world - but have to go on the defensive when Missys owner, the evil Regina, sets out to steal them for herself. Comedy sequel, starring Charles Grodin, Bonnie Hunt, Chris Penn, Nicholle Tom and Christopher Castle

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One in Vegas - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Rachel makes Ross regret playing a prank on her, while Monica and Chandler have a spot of good luck and Joey tries out his latest get-rich-quick scheme. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston, David Schwimmer and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross and Rachel wake up the morning after their impromptu marriage and regret the hasty circumstances of the ceremony, while Monica and Chandler find that neither of them really wants to rush to the altar. Joey and Phoebe have a cross-country adventure. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer, Jennifer Aniston, Lisa Kudrow and Matt LeBlanc

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Hugs Rachel
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler decide to move in together, but have difficulty explaining to Rachel that she will not be a part of the arrangement. Meanwhile, Phoebe begs Ross to get his latest marriage annulled. American comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross encourages Chandler and Monica to move in together and makes a dramatic decision about Rachel. David Schwimmer, Matthew Perry, Courteney Cox and Jennifer Aniston star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Loses His Insurance
programme.desc: Ross tries his hand at teaching and adopts an English accent in the process. Joey suffers a hernia and Rachel discovers her marriage has not been annulled. American comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc, David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey is mistaken for the owner of a Porsche and uses the mix-up to enhance his image. Rachel forces Ross to annul their marriage, and Phoebe tries her best to look after the triplets. American comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One on the Last Night
programme.desc: Joey and Chandler celebrate their last night as flatmates, and Ross claims he is too busy babysitting to help Monica as she frantically tries to arrange Rachels packing before the removal firm arrives. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: An Australian dancer (guest star Elle Macpherson) moves in with Joey and he struggles to refrain from flirting. Chandler tries to impress Monica by cleaning their flat, and Rachel is embarrassed by Phoebes jogging style. Comedy, with Matt LeBlanc and Matthew Perry

programme.title: What Women Want (2000)
programme.desc: A freak accident gives a womanising executive the ability to hear the thoughts of the opposite sex. Embittered after losing out on promotion to a female colleague, he uses his new-found talent to exact revenge - but the insight it provides ultimately brings out an unexpected sensitive side. Romantic comedy, starring Mel Gibson, Helen Hunt, Marisa Tomei, Alan Alda and Bette Midler

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: Gok Wan, Sarah Millican, Seann Walsh and Amy Childs join team captains Jon Richardson and Sean Lock on the irreverent panel show, hosted by Jimmy Carr. programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank catches a football at a college game and refuses to give it back. He tries instead to auction it over the radio for $10,000 - much to the horror of Ray, who tries to make him feel guilty for being so mercenary

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie receives a letter in which a relative boasts about how well her children are doing, and responds by enlisting Debras help to concoct a fictitious catalogue of her own familys achievements. Doris Roberts and Ray Romano star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra grudgingly agrees to let Ray have more involvement in the daily decision-making process, giving him the freedom to shop for grocery items he likes and choose where the family will go on holiday. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: First Dates

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Mula, 23, was stood up on her last visit to the restaurant, and shes hoping round two will be better. Funnyman AJ, also returning, tries to seduce her with his best jokes. Could it be second time lucky? Geordie postie Jodie is back after being friend-zoned last week, and shes pleasantly surprised by Irish beauty Louise. Tom is a suave, confident restaurateur looking for a refined lady, but dance teacher Alliee isnt immediately impressed by his well-rehearsed advances, including petrol-station flowers and champagne

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on The Celebrity Traitors, Trigger Point, Michael McIntyres The Wheel, The Great British Bake Off, Love Is Blind, DIY SOS and BBC News (clocks)

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eaterys decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brothers trust before he can save their business

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Pasadena, California, where he visits Jamaican-themed restaurant Cafe Kingston. The business in run by Dr Una Morris, a micro-managing owner who also works at a radiotherapy clinic next door, and is determined to introduce hospital-style techniques to the kitchen by sealing everything in plastic bags

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: A new cellmate spells danger for Lucas, forcing Dillon to take desperate measures. Theresa pushes Mercedes to give Warren another chance. programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claires newfound positivity leads her to inadvertently approve of Lukes new relationship with someone from work, while Phil gets a shock when he surprises Alex at school

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley and Dylans plan to quietly elope before the babies are born doesnt go as smoothly as they had hoped. Meanwhile, Jay continues to try to get his new business off the ground by courting an Instagram celebrity

programme.title: My Spy (2020)
programme.desc: Special Forces operative turned spy JJ undertakes covert surveillance of Kate Newton, the sister-in-law of a terrorist. JJ is ordered to keep a low profile. Unfortunately, Kates resourceful nine-year-old daughter Sophie blows his cover and blackmails JJ into training her as a spy. Comedy, starring Dave Bautista and Chloe Coleman

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer present the show on E4 for the second week running to make way for the Winter Paralympics. Andi Osho has the lowdown on her new book, Maisie Adam and Sam Campbell preview the new series of Last One Laughing, Squeeze frontman Glenn Tilbrook chats about his music and Lucinda Light has gossip from Married at First Sight. Plus, music by Don Broco

programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sheep

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Chris is forced to admit that Brook is ticking all of his boxes, Gia weighs up taking an intimate step with Scott after years of celibacy, while Alissa and David make the most of their mountain escape

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle (2017)
programme.desc: Four teenagers play a jungle-themed game on an old console, only to find themselves transported into the game and transformed into its heroic characters. They must embark on a death-defying journey through the games wilderness setting to make it back to the real world, or be stuck as video game characters forever. Fantasy action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black

programme.sub-title: Portrait of a Lackey on Fire
programme.desc: Homer offers to play matchmaker for Smithers and introduces him to jetsetting fashion designer mogul Michael de Graaf

programme.desc: A retired former special forces agent has the job of chauffeuring the son of a controversial Miami politician. When Russian criminals kidnap the youngster and inject him with a virus in the hope of infecting his father, the driver sets out to find the boy and his abductors. Action thriller sequel, starring Jason Statham, Alessandro Gassman and Amber Valletta

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Dating show hosted by Anna Richardson in which two singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who are revealed to them one body part at a time. They then they whittle the candidates down until only one remains. In the first edition, Aina, a music producer from London, wants to find someone adventurous who she can have a deeper connection with, while Guildford-based designer Mal - who has dated men and women - is curious to see who she will be drawn to when all options are laid bare before her. The first episode features Aina, a music producer from London, and Mal, a designer from Guildford

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

Finally its Biancas turn to cook for her guests and expectations are high for the foodie of the week to cook up a great meal with the help of husband Dave. But who will secure the £1,000 prize?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: A trio of couples compete to be the best dinner party hosts in Coventry, beginning with joker Neal and his level-headed wife Hazel, who let themselves down with a few cooking errors. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Berkshire compete to host the best dinner party and walk away with the cash prize of £1,000, with Julian and Lesley, who prepare a meat-heavy menu, Tash and Rob, whose healthy meal has an unwelcome ingredient in the dessert, and Chris and Amanda, who recite their wedding vows during the evening

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Reading compete to host the best dinner party. Upstanding couple Liz and David kick off the competition with a menu replicating the first food they ever cooked together. However, prank-loving guests Jo and Steve take centre stage as talk around the table turns a bit alternative. On fashion models Franky and Charlis night, Liz proves to be the wildcard as she reveals how much shes researched their online portfolios. On the final night, Jo cannot stomach whats on her and Steves own menu. However, it remains to be seen who will walk away with the cash prize of £1,000

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in to Connecticuts oldest inn, the Curtis House in Woodbury, which has been owned by the Hardisty family for generations. However, the business has started to fall apart and their legacy is on the brink of being lost. Siblings Chris and TJ, who are in charge, no longer speak to each other and the staff and guests feel stuck in the middle

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Pipestone, Minnesota, where he checks in to Historic Calumet Inn. Joint owners Vanda and Rina Smrkovski were given the hotel as a gift by their father, but after just nine months in charge, their staff are on the brink of revolt, and guests are expressing their dissatisfaction with the accommodation. Gordon quickly realises the sisters need to grow up fast if hes going to have a chance of saving the business

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Anglers Lodge in Island Park, Idaho. Owner Dave Eby built the lodge with his own hands, but a family tragedy has caused him and wife Dede to shy away from the hotel and the community. Gordon is desperate to help mend this broken family - but is it too late to save their business?

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Southbridge, Massachusetts, where he checks into the Vienna Inn, an Austrian-themed hotels and restaurant. Owners Jonathan and Lisa Krach have seen their cluttered inn acquire a negative reputation among the locals, and as a result, business isnt what it used to be. Can Gordon turn things round and keep the doors to this historic hotel open?

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay heads to Harpers Ferry in West Virginia, where he tries to save the Towns Inn, a historic hotel run by retired teacher and junk hoarder Karan Townsend. She has accumulated so many useless belongings that there is hardly any room to accommodate guests. Can Gordon convince her to get rid of her clutter or will the hotel continue to go down the pan?

programme.title: First Dates

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eaterys decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brothers trust before he can save their business

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Pasadena, California, where he visits Jamaican-themed restaurant Cafe Kingston. Action thriller sequel, starring Jason Statham, Alessandro Gassman and Amber Valletta

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Dating show hosted by Anna Richardson in which two singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who are revealed to them one body part at a time. In the first edition, Aina, a music producer from London, wants to find someone adventurous who she can have a deeper connection with, while Guildford-based designer Mal - who has dated men and women - is curious to see who she will be drawn to when all options are laid bare before her. programme.desc: Adams in Bari tasting the most iconic foods named after this city, including focaccia Barese and a local seafood dish called tiella Barese

programme.desc: Adams in Rome tasting the most iconic foods named after this city, including pasta dish cacio e pepe, and porchetta Romana: suckling pig Rome style

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef arrives at the Palace of Versailles, a vast royal hunting lodge which boasts amazing architecture and a great market. He talks about food fashions and seasonality with the director of the Kings allotment, meets a chocolatier who makes enormous chocolate sculptures, which he then casts in bronze or aluminium, and visits Alain Ducasses newly opened Restaurant Ore. Dishes include sole Veronique, roasted spelt and wild mushrooms, and veal chops

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef ends his excursion at the Bois de Boulogne, a park on the outskirts of Paris, coinciding with the hosting of a prestigious steeplechase event at its Auteuil Hippodrome. James meets fellow Yorkshireman and jockey James Revelly and rustles up leeks vinaigrette with salmon and lamb cutlets with a colourful ratatouille. Later, the chef pays a visit to the Michelin-starred Pre Catelan restaurant, where he enjoys his favourite meal of the trip

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding host a 1980s-themed episode of the contest. The signature challenge features a classic quiche, while the technical round requires the bakers to master a popular retro sweet treat. For their final showstopper task, the contestants must keep their cool while preparing an ice cream cake before judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood pick this weeks star baker and decide who will be leaving the tent

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present dessert week of the culinary competition. The signature round features a miniature cheesecake, while the technical challenge features a dish that dates back to the 17th century. Finally, for their showstoppers, the bakers must concoct a jelly art dessert cake constructed of delicate sponge. Judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith are on hand to sample the results and decide who will be Star Baker and who will be leaving the tent

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding present this years semi-final, the last four bakers facing three patisserie challenges to decide who will be going through to next weeks final. The signature round features plenty of alcohol, while the technical challenge sets the bakers the task of making pastry horns. Finally, for the Showstopper, they must use all the precision they can muster to construct a cake made entirely from smaller cakes

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host the grand final. The last three bakers face three tests of a range of baking skills - a deceptively simple signature round combining set custard and puff pastry, a technical celebrating the classic combination of chocolate and nuts, and a magnificent dessert tower for their final showstopper, before judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood select the winner

programme.desc: Casey Webb visits Richmond for a lesson on New Zealand-style savoury pies. Plus, he enjoys an elevated Jewish deli experience and a mighty burger challenge

programme.title: Man v Food with Casey Webb
programme.desc: Casey Webb visits Virginia Beach, where he enjoys a street corn fritter-topped burger, a decadent croissant-muffin hybrid and a corned beef omelette challenge

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Mediterranean Adventure
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers discover the culinary delights of Corsica, starting out in a delicatessen to get a taste of the local cuisine, including the figatelli sausage. The owner explains how most of the islands food is made up of a holy trinity of ingredients - meat, cheese and chestnuts, a list that forms the basis of the bikers exploration

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree prepares her teenage sons favourite food, including meatball subs, spicy mac and cheese, and confetti blondies

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Its Ree and Ladds birthdays so they celebrate with skillet spaghetti with meatballs and garlic bread. Then, they enjoy a black forest cake for dessert

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver offers a solutions-based guide to make brilliantly easy and delicious meals all cooked in one pan, pot or dish. In this episode, he whips up super-speedy smashed lemongrass chicken, sweet potato chilli with homemade nachos, and a chocolate party tray cake with tinned mandarin and buttercream filling

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie cooks two one-pan recipes that are ideal for busy lives: his take on shakshuka with asparagus, broccoli and harissa, plus an outrageously good pulled pork that can be batched up, frozen and used in loads of meals whenever you need it

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten and her friends Eli Zabar and David Ziff prepare Mediterranean-inspired dishes

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina prepares a fool proof menu for any special occasion. The buffet table includes tarragon potato salad, chunky blue cheese and vegetable coleslaw

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Four bakers remain in the hunt for the title of Britains best amateur baker, but they all need to raise their game when they tackle a trio of classic patisserie confections in the semi-final. A petits fours-making challenge provides an early test of nerves, before the quartet face the toughest technical task in the shows history - creating a fraisier, a sponge cake filled with mousse and strawberries. As tempers rise and confidence falters, the contestants have one last chance to impress judges Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry by baking a showstopping choux gateau - before discovering who has earned a place in the 2012 final. Presented by Sue Perkins and Mel Giedroyc

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: After weeks of pastries, cakes and sponges, collapsing gingerbread houses and dodgy doughnuts, there are only three remaining bakers. But only one can be crowned the winner, and to prove they have what it takes the finalists face their most demanding challenges yet. Over two days, they must create a perfect pithivier, or puff-pastry pie, before making fondant fancies and their last showstopper - the notoriously difficult chiffon sponge. Only then will judges Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry decide who deserves the 2012 title. Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef travels through France to visit the locations that inspired his culinary career, beginning at the Chateau Cheval Blanc in Saint-Emilion, before going back to the kitchens of the Hostellerie de Plaisance, where he worked as a lad more than 30 years ago. He rounds off his trip by cooking at an award-winning vineyard

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chefs journey continues along the Canal du Midi in southern France, starting in Carcassonne, where he joins the tourists taking in the sights and doing a little shopping. After cooking up a delicious fish stew on the banks of the canal, James hops aboard a boat for a trip towards the coast and is treated to a traditional cuttlefish lunch cooked in the boats tiny kitchen

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes
programme.desc: The celebrated seafood chef begins a culinary romp around Britain, sampling some of the local dishes he holds dear. His journey begins in Lands End, where he goes on a pigeon shoot, before fishing for mackerel on the coast of Falmouth. Culinary highlights include forgotten dishes like pigeon and peas, and clotted cream with langoustine quiche

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes
programme.desc: The seafood chef continues his culinary tour of Britain, meeting happy pigs on the Isle of Wight, sampling real cider in Somerset and tasting hot peppery watercress from Hampshire before tickling his tastebuds with Thomas Hardys favourite cheese

programme.title: Man v Food: Best Of
programme.desc: Adam is in Tennessee to taste succulent baby back ribs that have been charcoal smoked for 14 hours. And, he is challenged to finish a humongous smoked meat sandwich

programme.title: Man v Food: Best Of
programme.desc: Adam travels to North Carolina to try a 20-ounce bacon double-cheeseburger. Later, he is given one hour to finish off one of the spiciest burgers in Texas

programme.title: Man v Food with Casey Webb
programme.desc: Casey Webb is in Charlotte, North Carolina, to try out three southern specialities - a cheesy chicken dish, a signature sandwich and a huge taco

programme.title: Man v Food with Casey Webb
programme.desc: Casey Webbs culinary adventures take him to North Carolina. He tries a barbecue bonanza, a burrito and takes part in the undefeated Pierogi team challenge

programme.title: Man v Food with Casey Webb
programme.desc: Casey Webbs epic food adventure takes him to Lafayette, Louisiana. He tries Cajun stew and accepts an ultra-spicy ramen bowl challenge

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Italy
programme.desc: Adams in Bari tasting the most iconic foods named after this city, including focaccia Barese and a local seafood dish called tiella Barese

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Italy
programme.desc: Adams in Rome tasting the most iconic foods named after this city, including pasta dish cacio e pepe, and porchetta Romana: suckling pig Rome style

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef arrives at the Palace of Versailles, a vast royal hunting lodge which boasts amazing architecture and a great market. He talks about food fashions and seasonality with the director of the Kings allotment, meets a chocolatier who makes enormous chocolate sculptures, which he then casts in bronze or aluminium, and visits Alain Ducasses newly opened Restaurant Ore. Dishes include sole Veronique, roasted spelt and wild mushrooms, and veal chops

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef ends his excursion at the Bois de Boulogne, a park on the outskirts of Paris, coinciding with the hosting of a prestigious steeplechase event at its Auteuil Hippodrome. James meets fellow Yorkshireman and jockey James Revelly and rustles up leeks vinaigrette with salmon and lamb cutlets with a colourful ratatouille. Later, the chef pays a visit to the Michelin-starred Pre Catelan restaurant, where he enjoys his favourite meal of the trip

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding host a 1980s-themed episode of the contest. The signature challenge features a classic quiche, while the technical round requires the bakers to master a popular retro sweet treat. For their final showstopper task, the contestants must keep their cool while preparing an ice cream cake before judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood pick this weeks star baker and decide who will be leaving the tent

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present dessert week of the culinary competition. The signature round features a miniature cheesecake, while the technical challenge features a dish that dates back to the 17th century. Finally, for their showstoppers, the bakers must concoct a jelly art dessert cake constructed of delicate sponge. Judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith are on hand to sample the results and decide who will be Star Baker and who will be leaving the tent

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding present this years semi-final, the last four bakers facing three patisserie challenges to decide who will be going through to next weeks final. The signature round features plenty of alcohol, while the technical challenge sets the bakers the task of making pastry horns. Finally, for the Showstopper, they must use all the precision they can muster to construct a cake made entirely from smaller cakes

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host the grand final. The last three bakers face three tests of a range of baking skills - a deceptively simple signature round combining set custard and puff pastry, a technical celebrating the classic combination of chocolate and nuts, and a magnificent dessert tower for their final showstopper, before judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood select the winner

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Mississippi Adventure
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King follow in the footsteps of music legends and try more Southern food, stopping at a classic diner to try Tennessee dishes. The duo then head to Elvis Presleys Graceland mansion in Memphis, where they interview George Klein, a friend of the singer

programme.title: M*A*S*H (1970)
programme.desc: American battlefield surgeons embark on a campaign of drinking, womanising and practical jokes in an attempt to alleviate the horror of the Korean War. programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

Crossing words to beat the reigning champions this time are sisters Lauren and Ellie from Solihull and friends Gill and Sue

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?

programme.title: Tipping Point

Prison drama, starring Ian Ogilvy, Billy Murray, Julian Glover and Lysette Anthony

programme.title: Freight (2010)
programme.desc: A Russian gang operates a people trafficking operation out of Leeds, but are drawn into conflict with a local gangster. When the Russians abduct his daughter, the gangster calls in an old friend from his SAS days to rescue the girl and bring down her kidnappers. Action thriller, starring Craig Fairbrass and Billy Murray

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Malibu Shark Attack (2009)
programme.desc: An underwater earthquake causes a tsunami that unleashes a pack of goblin sharks on an unsuspecting Malibu beach. Quick thinking from the local lifeguards ensures the area is cleared before the monsters strike, but a number of people remain abandoned in high water and must fight the creatures to reach dry land. Horror, starring Peta Wilson, Warren Christie and Chelan Simmons

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The gang joins a football team on a trip behind the Iron Curtain - to free an East German scientist. Action adventure, starring Robert Vaughn, Mr T and George Peppard

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The outbreak of a revolution interferes with the gangs plans to rescue three American agents from a Third World country. Action adventure, starring Mr T and George Peppard

programme.title: The A-Team

programme.title: The A-Team

programme.title: The A-Team

programme.title: Triple Cross (1966)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War spy adventure about Eddie Chapman, a bank robber who became a British double agent in exchange for money and a full pardon. Following the German invasion of Jersey, Chapman offers to provide information to the Nazis, who are unaware his loyalties really lie with the British Secret Service. With Christopher Plummer, Trevor Howard, Yul Brynner, Romy Schneider and Claudine Auger

programme.title: Island of Terror (1966)
programme.desc: A pathologist investigates a series of gruesome deaths on a small island. He discovers that an experiment carried out by a group of doctors trying to find a cure for cancer has created a race of mutant creatures that suck the bones from the bodies of their human prey. Horror, starring Peter Cushing and Edward Judd

programme.title: The Fabulous Journey to the Centre of the Earth (1978)

programme.sub-title: The Old Man in the Cave

Thriller, starring Michael Caine, David Warner, Frank Middlemass, Don Henderson, Dudley Sutton and Colin Jeavons

programme.desc: Vincent obtains X-rays of an injured aliens chest - which reveal the creature has no bone structure. Roy Thinnes stars

programme.title: Flight to Tangier (1953)

programme.title: The War Lord (1965)
programme.desc: An 11th-century Norman knight is sent by the duke he serves to defend a druid village. Permitted under feudal law, he takes another mans wife, who falls in love with him and has no intention of returning to her husband. However, her vengeful spouse is outraged and ignites a civil war by influencing the knights brother to turn against him. Medieval drama, with Charlton Heston, Rosemary Forsyth, Richard Boone and Maurice Evans

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: Kirk, Spock and McCoy become slaves on the planet Platonius, where the entire population is governed by mind-controlling aliens who plan to manipulate the Enterprise crew for their own amusement. Starring William Shatner, Leonard Nimoy and DeForest Kelley

programme.title: The Invaders

programme.title: The A-Team

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Part two of two. Alex is wounded at Kim and Phils wedding. Adventure with the modern-day lawman whose crime-solving methods are rooted firmly in the Old West

programme.title: Law Abiding Citizen (2009)
programme.desc: A man is forced to witness the murder of his wife and daughter, and is driven to despair when one of the perpetrators walks free at trial. Years later, he begins a campaign of vigilante violence, seeking revenge on the killers and the justice system that failed to punish them, particularly an assistant district attorney who allowed the defendant to make a deal during the court proceedings. Thriller, with Gerard Butler and Jamie Foxx

programme.title: Lucky Number Slevin (2006)
programme.desc: A case of mistaken identity plunges an ordinary man into the middle of a war between crime syndicates. With no means of proving who he really is, he finds himself forced to pay off a friends debt to an underworld kingpin by assassinating a rival mobster. Thriller, starring Josh Hartnett, Bruce Willis, Lucy Liu, Morgan Freeman and Ben Kingsley

programme.title: Acts of Vengeance (2017)
programme.desc: A lawyer transforms his body and takes a vow of silence, not to be broken until he finds out who killed his wife and daughter and has his revenge. Drama, starring Antonio Banderas

programme.title: Witchfinder General (1968)
programme.desc: A lawyer callously destroys innocent lives while performing his duties as a witchfinder, earning a terrifying reputation for brutality and injustice. However, he meets his match in a courageous soldier seeking revenge on the man for having raped his betrothed. Michael Reeves 17th-century period horror, starring Vincent Price, Ian Ogilvy, Rupert Davies, Patrick Wymark and Hilary Dwyer

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: When a car collides with two children walking home from school, two ambulances, a doctor and a critical care paramedic are sent to the scene. Paramedics also treat a man whos having back-to-back epileptic seizures, and a four-month-old baby with a barking cough is finding it increasingly difficult to breathe

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics are called to a rare and unusual stomach condition thats left a patient in agony. On the night shift, a young man is intoxicated and passed out in the street. An elderly man has fallen at home and cant get back up, and a confused and disorientated woman has one of the highest blood pressure readings the paramedics have ever seen

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: New staff nurse Sophie attends to 22-year-old chef James, who accidentally stabbed himself in the leg while chopping tomatoes. During an eventful shift, she also uses chest compressions to keep alive another patient and helps 54-year-old Bernard, who was out cold for 10 minutes after falling and banging his head against a car. However, when his family arrives, it turns out he had been drinking

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Consultant Jacqui must act fast when severely underweight baby Jaziah is rushed into resus with breathing difficulties. In paediatric AandE, it is hoped that 18-month-old Charlies urine test results will explain why he has been feeling unwell for five days, while 81-year-old Ronald prepares for a CT scan after suffering a suspected stroke that is affecting his speech

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: Five holiday-hungry Brits jet off to the same popular holiday destination for a five-day getaway, with each traveller taking control of the groups activities for 24 hours. Were off to Benidorm for the competitions first week, where show singer Wyen splashes out on a luxury yacht, books herself a suite on the sly, and performs a self-penned song

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first in a week of dinner parties from in and around Bristol. Up first is Jade, who throws a festival-themed evening with its own drum and bass rave. Her guests are community football CEO Adam, nanny Sarah, 62-year-old property investor and developer Joe, and 26-year-old musician Jack

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second host of the week is football fan Adam in Bristol who dedicates his dinner to his favourite sport, unfortunately his guests dont share his enthusiasm. Tensions at the table rise between Jade and Sarah leading to a red card from the host

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third host of the week is dance enthusiast and property developer Joe who creates an evening dedicated to the happiness of holidaying with a taste of Dominican food for his guests. Will his Caribbean theme be paradise or purgatory?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jazz musician Jack puts on an evening of vintage couture, sophistication and class, and his rivals in and around Bristol embrace the theme. However, the hosts timings and temperature make it hard not to notice the pressure he has put himself under

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Nanny Sarah is the last to host in Bristol, preparing an evening of childrens food presented in a sophisticated manner. The soiree kicks off with a promise of payback after Sarahs critique earlier in the week, and as the night develops, the atmosphere becomes more tense and awkward as the feedback comes thick and fast. However, that doesnt stop the host putting on a show that no one will forget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Welsh champion sausage-maker Steve and his wife Helen have travelled the world in search of the perfect holiday home and have decided that Torrox on the Costa del Sol is for them. Scarlette Douglas pulls out all the stops to show five properties within her budget of £95,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies jets off to Portugals Setúbal Peninsula to help house-hunters Tony and Hendrik from York find their dream holiday home. The couple, whove been married for three years and have two daughters, are looking for somewhere they can all enjoy as a family, for their maximum budget of £330,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Dance teacher Karen is joined by her sister Sheila and Jean Johansson as they search for a permanent home in Charente, southwest France, that she can also use as a yoga studio and gite business With a budget of £210,000, Jean shows the sisters five potential properties

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton heads to the coastal town of Paralimni in eastern Cyprus to help Yvonne and Tony find their perfect property. Yvonne and Tony first visited Cyprus on their honeymoon 27 years ago and they immediately fell in love with the place. Theyve been back plenty of times since, but after a few tough years, have decided to seize every second they have and buy a holiday home for the whole family to enjoy. Within their budget of £80,000, Laura shows them five impressive properties

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Nick and Rose from Southampton are looking for a holiday home on the Caribbean island of Barbados. Their plan is to spend up to six months a year enjoying the tropical climate and golf facilities. Craig Rowe shows them the best of what their £550,000 budget can get with five impressive properties

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Alex and Danny Moore in Preston, and offer the pair advice on whether they should renovate their home or put it on the market. Danny wants to do up the property and sell it on, but Alex has other ideas, and thinks the house is the perfect place for them to start a family

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help two sets of house-hunters looking for homes in the historic city of York. Kirstie helps first-time buyers Tom and Timna, who met at university, married soon after and are now expecting their first child. With the lease on their rental almost up, time is of the essence find them their family home. Phil is searching for Yorkshire-born Rich and Kirsty, who have been living it up in London but want to move back up North to be closer to their family - and to start their own

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first destination is North Kingsfield Holiday Cottages in East Yorkshire, where a revelation over evening drinks leaves the guests all at sea

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Crackin View Guest House in Northumberland. Owners Steve and Maria Turnbull reckon their scenic vista and homespun appeal will pip their rivals to the post

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals arrive at the Domo Boutique Hotel in Oldbury near Birmingham, where owner Ali expects his luxury lodgings to wow his fellow competitors. Helen and Lauren are dazzled by the decor, but a caffeine conundrum leads to some trouble brewing

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guest house owners convene at the Crown Inn in Gayton, Norfolk, where owners Lisa and Neil Staples hope their historic setting and boutique-style rooms will garner praise. Once theyve checked in, Helen and Lauren make a critical observation about the cleanliness of the windows, while Ali and Serge are left feeling exposed in the bathroom. On a buggy ride across a wildlife reserve, the rivalry spills over into some raucous racing - but at drinks, its Neils chat-up lines that veer off track

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hosts meet one last time to settle scores and discover what theyve been paid. First up is Helen Milner, and her daughter Lauren, but although they asked one pair to close off their curtain comments, its a surprising set of payments which leave them open-mouthed. Another host addresses why his guests werent full of beans - only for one pair to express some strong opinions about his breakfast. Off-colour feedback about one BandBs bedding leads to more frank exchanges. The guests dramatic discoveries surface, before the payments are revealed and the winner is finally announced

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A patient has a nosebleed that wont stop, and is concerned that it could be linked to a recent bleed on the brain. Paramedics treat a woman who wakes up in the night having a heart attack. A patient with abdominal pain has lost a lot of blood and needs to go to hospital, while on the night shift, a drunk man who has collapsed in the street refuses medical help

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: At Nottinghams Queens Medical Centre, 87-year-old Joan is brought in after falling on a moving tram and cutting open the back of her head. Nineteen-year-old Rose faces life-changing injuries after a collision with a car and 13-year-old Prince has broken his leg in three places playing football

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Henry is brought to Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham after being hit accidentally by a forklift truck driven by his dad. X-rays confirm that both his legs are broken. Nahum and Dean arrive by ambulance following a road traffic accident, and 94-year-old Pearl comes in after badly cutting her arm by trapping it in a lift

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics are called out to a woman who got tangled up in her dogs leads, leaving her lapsing in and out of consciousness on her 45th wedding anniversary. Meanwhile, a man is in severe pain with an umbilical hernia and a woman has a suspected seizure at work. The paramedics also attend a baby thats just been born, with the mother having to deliver her baby on the bathroom floor

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: At Nottinghams Queens Medical Centre, 87-year-old Joan is brought in after falling on a moving tram and cutting open the back of her head. Nineteen-year-old Rose faces life-changing injuries after a collision with a car and 13-year-old Prince has broken his leg in three places playing football

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Henry is brought to Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham after being hit accidentally by a forklift truck driven by his dad. X-rays confirm that both his legs are broken. Nahum and Dean arrive by ambulance following a road traffic accident, and 94-year-old Pearl comes in after badly cutting her arm by trapping it in a lift

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: Lisa hosts the second day and takes the gang on an off-road quad bike adventure followed by an evening with a Bob Marley tribute act. While most have a ball, yesterdays host just wants to bail

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Claire Hilton, who runs Robertsbrook Guest House in Swanage, Dorset, feels she has a good chance of winning the title of best BandB as another round of the competition gets under way. However, guests Lynn Self and Ziggy Broome have doubts over the cleanliness of their bedroom, and another couple are accustomed to more opulent surroundings

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien finds a barn containing a collection of replica Rolls-Royce cars, and Henry Cole tries his hand at driving a tractor as they continue their money-making tour

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Chris and Marie are looking for the perfect place to enjoy their retirement in Manilva on Spains Costa del Sol. Chris wants a property on a golf resort, while Marie wants to live closer to town. Danni Menzies hopes to help them find a happy compromise, with their budget of £125,000

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition visits the Nottingham and Derby area. American Hali kicks proceeding off with a travel-inspired menu, including Moroccan chicken cigars and an unusual dessert combination. With a very gregarious gathering of guests, the food plays second fiddle to a fun night of impressions, dance moves and kitchen chaos

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition continues in the Nottingham and Derby area. Car salesman Alistair hopes to step the competition up a gear. However, after narrowly avoiding an argument last night with Lesley, the veteran of the group, hes treading on thin ice. And hes serving up a bizarre menu, including chilli soup - for dessert - and prunes

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Nottingham, fun-loving funeral arranger Kim hosts an evening packed with games galore and a mixed bag menu. Fifty-seven-year-old Lesley is again the butt of car salesman Alistairs geriatric jibes and takes great delight in watching him put on the spot during a dance-off

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Customer relations associate and part-time drag queen Adam plans a theatrical night of flamboyance as the culinary competition continues in the Derby and Nottingham area. Can he get his guests begging for an encore, will Alastair and Lesley ever kiss and make up and what will Adams guests think of his secret hobby as a ufologist?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final soiree in the Nottingham and Derby area sees 57-year-old Lesley counting on a night of glamour and glitz - plus some good home-cooked food - to secure the £1,000 prize. However, before any food is even dished up, the guests make a surprising discovery about the host

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at My Way Guest House in Broompark, Co Durham, where Kaye Horner and her daughter Lily are counting on their cleanliness to gain top marks

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to the Old Orleton Inn in Wellington, Shropshire, where an award-winning breakfast is on offer - but a lack of showers does not go down well

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Ambles House in Northampton, where Amanda hopes her homely hospitality will win over her guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Richard and Harriet Secular pride themselves on their high-end rooms at the Royal George in Tintern in Monmouthshire - and the guests are not disappointed, with plenty of praise for the hosts throughout the two days. Will the feedback mirror their experience?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet up for a final showdown, as Kaye and Lily bring Harriet and Richards blind issues to light before dishing the dirt on Sophie and Davids discoveries. Amanda wants to know why frank feelings were unleased when it came to her canine companion, Trudy. David and Sophie banish Harriet and Richards bathroom blues, before confronting Kaye and Lily with their cleanliness critique. After opinions are aired and differences debated, the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw help Darren, who was left disabled after a tragic road accident in which he saved his grandson, by fixing up his iconic 1989 Golf

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw take on one of the most divisive British sports cars ever made - a Triumph TR7. Can the team help make owner Barrys dream come true?

programme.title: The Dog House Australia
programme.desc: High-energy kelpie Tess could be the perfect training companion for eight-year-old Sophie. Lolla might be the right big, goofy dog that tai chi instructor Amanda is searching for

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets architectural designer Dan and interior designer Nina, who want to build a sleek, unique family house. But the plot they have bought, near a beautiful estuary in West Sussex, is dominated by a swampy pond that they are unable to fill in. Instead, they plan to make it central to their design, turning the pond into a biodiverse waterscape, and then floating their house above it. Its a challenge for anyone - but to save money, Dan is doing it largely himself, despite his limited experience with new builds

programme.title: Our Farm Next Door: Amanda, Clive and Kids
programme.desc: As winter turns to spring, the Owen family balance the pressures of lambing season with the race to get their farmhouse renovation watertight. Amanda and Clive digest exciting news from the planners which could see the scope of the renovation - and the workload- grow massively, while eldest Owen son Reuben teams up with sidekick and younger brother Sidney to tackle the ongoing drainage issues

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside one of Britains busiest AandE departments at Kings College Hospital in south London. A doctor is shocked when a young woman arrives in resus with life-threatening swelling on her brain following a random attack by a stranger, while a mother faces an agonising wait as tests are carried out on her 12-year-old son, who was hit by a car and airlifted to Kings by emergency medics. A 90-year-old former circus performer is also in AandE after collapsing at home, and news of his colourful past quickly circulates among the staff

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Eighty-year-old Rose has fluid on her lungs and is having trouble breathing. Her daughters Christine, Sandra and Debbie put on brave faces around her bedside, convincing her that everything will be all right, but in the relatives room theres high emotion as they contemplate life without their mother. Also in resus at Kings College Hospital is Kevin, a 55-year-old trucker who has sustained injuries in a road accident

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics help a man with a history of heart attacks experiencing severe chest pain. Treatment at the scene does little to improve his condition, so he is rushed to hospital. Paramedics also treat an elderly man whos collapsed underneath his bed, a baby struggling to breathe, and a 102-year-old woman who may have developed deep vein thrombosis but is reluctant to go to hospital

programme.title: Edwardian Britain in Colour
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part documentary in which social historians examine surviving film footage of Britain in the early years of the 20th century. The first episode features footage of Queen Victorias state funeral in 1901 and a bicycle parade celebrating the coronation of the new king. The programme also examines life for people employed in the mining and cotton industries, as well as how an increase in leisure time led to the the popularity of seaside resorts soaring, with Blackpool leading the way

programme.title: Edwardian Britain in Colour
programme.desc: Conclusion of the two-part documentary in which social historians examine surviving footage of Britain in the early years of the 20th century. This edition featuring clips of people celebrating the arrival of a new tram in Wigan, a football match in Burnley, and a public swimming gala in Tynemouth, and film of suffragette Emily Wilding Davison colliding with the kings horse at the 1913 Epsom Derby

programme.title: America the Bountiful

programme.title: 1066: A Year to Conquer England
programme.desc: Docudrama in which Dan Snow explores the political intrigues and family betrayals between Vikings, Anglo-Saxons and Normans that led to the Battle of Hastings. The first edition reveals how the death of Edward the Confessor without an heir triggered a bitter race to succeed him as king of England, with Earl Harold successfully taking the crown. However, William of Normandy believes the throne has been promised to him and decides to invade, while Viking king Harald Hardrada also fancies himself as monarch

programme.title: 1066: A Year to Conquer England
programme.desc: As Dan Snows docudrama continues, King Harold has to take on two invasion forces. First, his brother Tostig attacks the south coast. He is repelled, but there is more to come. Later in the year, a vast Viking invasion force led by King Harald Hardrada of Norway lands in the north of England. Harold rushes to Stamford Bridge to fight for his kingdom and for his life

programme.title: 1066: A Year to Conquer England
programme.desc: After months trapped in a port in northern France, the winds finally change and Duke William leads his vast invasion fleet across the Channel. Catastrophically, King Harold is 300 miles away in the north, having defeated the Vikings. Harold rushes back south, gathers a new army, and heads to Hastings to take on this new invasion. The two armies will meet at Battle in Sussex on October 14, 1066, and the outcome will change the shape of England and Europe for ever. Dan Snow presents

The programme also examines life for people employed in the mining and cotton industries, as well as how an increase in leisure time led to the the popularity of seaside resorts soaring, with Blackpool leading the way

programme.title: Edwardian Britain in Colour
programme.desc: Conclusion of the two-part documentary in which social historians examine surviving footage of Britain in the early years of the 20th century. This edition featuring clips of people celebrating the arrival of a new tram in Wigan, a football match in Burnley, and a public swimming gala in Tynemouth, and film of suffragette Emily Wilding Davison colliding with the kings horse at the 1913 Epsom Derby

programme.title: Thirties in Colour: Countdown to War
programme.desc: Colourised footage of films from the 1930s, including thousands of people attending a homecoming parade in Hull to celebrate local hero Amy Johnson, who at just 26 years old had become the first British woman to fly solo from Britain to Australia. Plus, the Jarrow unemployment protest of 1936, led by MP Ellen Wilkinson

programme.title: Thirties in Colour: Countdown to War
programme.desc: Colourised footage of films from the 1930s, including the abdication of King Edward VIII at a time when the nation needed stability the most and a top-secret conference between the prime minister and the Fuhrer. Plus, a fitness craze that saw women take to the great outdoors in their big knickers and blouses, and new prosperity in the south of Britain thanks to the Hoover factory

programme.title: Thirties in Colour: Countdown to War
programme.desc: Social historians and those with direct connections to the footage explore the last year before the Second World War officially began to reveal insights into child refugees and bomb attack drills

programme.title: Victorian Britain on Film
programme.desc: Documentary offering a unique window into a bygone era when a thrilling new invention, the motion picture camera, first captured a nation on film. Most of these films have been transformed by colourising them for the first time. They offer a rare portrait of a powerful and prosperous nation - and Empire - on the cusp of great change

programme.title: America the Bountiful
programme.desc: Capri Cafaro heads to Maryland to hear about the many varieties of crab in Chesapeake Bay and the use of the crustacean in their local cuisine, dating back to the 17th century

programme.title: The Bush Years: Family, Duty, Power
programme.desc: President George W. Bush strived to secure the second term his father never won. But the war he started in Iraq will cast a long shadow on the family

programme.title: Berlin: Stories of the City
programme.desc: Two-part documentary looking at the history of Berlin, starting from the era of Prussian kings through to the unification of Germany. Part one of two

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: Ken Burns documentary sin which the inhabitants of communities in Alabama, California, Connecticut and Minnesota recall the effects of the Second World War on their lives. It begins with the 12 months before the attack on Pearl Harbour, which belatedly brought their country into the conflict that cost the lives of more than 50 million people worldwide

programme.title: War Machine: World War II
programme.desc: Examining the weapons used on different battlegrounds during the Second World War, scrutinising their design, production, performance and their role in victory or defeat. During land warfare, every weapon was made to fill a specific need. Designed for a single purpose: to win the race for technological supremacy over the enemy. From handguns to tanks, the stakes were never greater

Their transportation is the oldest car ever to grace the trip, a 1932 Riley Monaco. Charles unearths a 19th-century Japanese find, and some items from closer to home, but further back in time. Natasha relies on some obscure primary-school knowledge to decode one of her finds

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

Home of the Year
programme.desc: Hugh Wallace, Amanda Bone and Siobhán Lam visit three more shortlisted homes hoping for a shot at the title. In Kerry, they find a free-flowing, open plan house that mirrors the owners time travelling and working together, while in Dublin, they visit a renovation that created a blend of traditional and contemporary. Finally, in Cork they judge a detached new build that draws on natural materials, neutral colours and Scandinavian styling to create a bright and airy atmosphere

programme.title: Beyond Paradise
programme.desc: Humphrey and Marthas wedding day finally arrives, with the lavish affair organised by Anne - whose plans feel far grander than anything either of them actually wanted. Meanwhile, theres no rest for the Shipton Abbott team members who have to deal with the theft of a valuable museum piece and a nefarious pair of cyber criminals before they can join in the celebrations. With bride and groom running around and thieves running amok in Shipton Abbott, can the team wrap everything up in time to mark Humphrey and Marthas long-awaited union - or does fate have other plans? Death in Paradise spin-off, starring Kris Marshall, Sally Bretton and Barbara Flynn

programme.title: The Towering Inferno (1974)
programme.desc: The worlds tallest building goes up in flames during the opening celebrations. While Doug Roberts, the architect who designed the skyscraper, tries to save the party-goers trapped on the 135th floor, fire chief Michael OHallorhan leads a valiant attempt to fight the blaze. Irwin Allen and John Guillermin shared directing duties on this triple Oscar-winning disaster epic with an all-star cast including Paul Newman, Steve McQueen, Faye Dunaway, William Holden, Fred Astaire, Richard Chamberlain, Susan Blakely and Robert Vaughn

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Sidney takes Geordie to Johnny Johnsons London jazz club, hoping to leave their worries in Grantchester for the night, but the backstage murder of Johnnys sister Claudette puts paid to that. As every lead seems to come back to Archies violent past, recriminations within the family begin to play out

programme.desc: Anne Cassin continues the celebration of National Tree Week with a look at an arts project dedicated to the precious and fragile environment of the forests overlooking Dublin city and what they mean to the many people who explore them every day. programme.title: Nationwide
programme.desc: Richard Downes look at life in Howth in north County Dublin, a busy coastal village beyond which lies true wilderness. He meets the people who keep the walking paths clear for locals and visitors as they discover this gem so close to the capital. Theres also a look at the mystery of the bells of St Marys Abbey, believed to be among the oldest in Ireland. These ancient bells disappeared in the 1700s, only to reappear in recent years

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Harper shuts Keri out. Sonny gets a reality check. Levi admits he needs a change

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Mali and Abigail assess their love. Leah makes an announcement. Will David have a change of heart?

programme.title: Monarch of the Glen
programme.desc: Paul strives to create a good impression on Lucys parents, and Ewan makes an unwelcome discovery about his father. Donald looks forward to cruising the open road in the Morgan, while Isobel and Jess get their wires crossed when they pass a wedding shop

programme.title: Monarch of the Glen
programme.desc: A revelation by clan elder Sheila MacDonald has repercussions for the estates residents, allowing Donald to create mischief at Pauls expense. Molly returns from New Zealand, while Meg attempts to rekindle her relationship with Golly and Chester continues with his charm offensive on Isobel

programme.title: Live Six Nations Under-20s
programme.desc: Ireland v Scotland (Kick-off 3.15pm). Jacqui Hurley is joined by Donal Lenihan, Fiona Coghlan and Jonny Holland to present coverage of the match from the final round of fixtures, which takes place at Virgin Media Park in Cork

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge convinces the town to pass anti-bullying legislation after Bart gets picked on at the school dance. Homer then gets arrested and sent to rehab for targeting Ned Flanders, only to subsequently leave the facility as a hero

programme.title: Smart Swarms
programme.desc: The work of scientists as they investigate the advantages of swarm intelligence, hoping to understand the organised chaos and intelligence of natural groups

programme.title: The Future of Nature
programme.desc: A look at how forest ecosystems reduce global carbon levels and effect climate, meeting the people working to improve biodiversity, saving keystone species and using Indigenous wisdom to rebuild and restore our forests

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Tsavo
programme.desc: First of a two-part documentary about the different creatures that call a waterhole home throughout the arid season in Kenya, including a family of elephants, a pair of hornbills, chameleons, bullfrogs, geese and dung beetles

programme.title: The Cleaner
programme.desc: Wicky heads to a stately home to clean up after the sad demise of an estate agent. Hes expecting to get a taste of how the other half live. What he finds is a strange time-warped Downton nightmare, a crumbling old pile ruled by a despotic housekeeper, Mrs Barton. Comedy, starring Greg Davies and Sharon Rooney

programme.title: Allianz League Sunday
programme.desc: Joanne Cantwell is joined by Enda McGinley and Paul Flynn for highlights and analysis of the weekends action, including Kerry v Mayo, and Dublin v Armagh in Allianz Football League Division One, plus Louth v Derry, and Cork v Kildare in Allianz Football League Division Two

programme.title: Life and Death Row
programme.desc: The sentencing trial of former Marine Patrick McDowell, who had pleaded guilty to the murder of deputy sheriff Joshua Moyers in 2021. The jury were asked to decide whether he should face life in prison without parole or the death penalty - and a new law in Florida meant that they were no longer required to be unanimous

programme.title: D-Day: The Unheard Tapes
programme.desc: Hundreds of thousands of Allied troops land on five beaches along the Normandy coast - as told by those who were there in interviews lip-synced by actors. Powerful interviews with those who were there lead us through their story of the invasion as it unfolds. American soldiers on Omaha face a bloodbath, while Royal Marine commandos encounter chaos at Sword Beach. As night draws in, troops finally make it off the sand - but the threats ahead prove even greater
