programme.desc: Hugh Cahill and guests Bernard Jackman, Darren Cave and Donal Lenihan take a look back at the final weekend of the Six Nations

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier attempts to convince the universitys provost to grant him full professor status. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: The 98th Academy Awards 2026
programme.desc: Coverage of the 98th Oscars from the Dolby Theatre in Ovation Hollywood, hosted by Conan OBrien. Sinners, Frankenstein, Marty Supreme and One Battle After Another all look like strong contenders for awards, while Jessie Buckley generated significant buzz in Tinseltown for her performance in Hamnet. Shes nominated for Actress in a Leading Role, and Wunmi Mosaku could also make an impact in the Supporting Actress category for Sinners. As for Best Picture, the race is wide open, with F1, Bugonia, Frankenstein, Hamnet, Marty Supreme, One Battle After Another, The Secret Agent, Sentimental Value, Sinners and Train Dreams all in contention

programme.title: First Dates Ireland
programme.desc: Glamorous pharmacy technician Mim is paired with engineer Jack but the odds appear stacked against him - until he reveals he drives a BMW. Esther from Arklow is looking from compassion and cuddles, and hopes that Liam from Dublin may be just the man for her, while Polish born bus driver Marcin from Inchicore dreams of big love with a guy just like himself. But will he find it with his big, bald, bearded doppelganger Cavan, a rugby player from Laois?

programme.title: Shortscreen
programme.desc: Ryan is determined to celebrate his 12th birthday with glamour and style. But it looks like Mams erratic behaviour might derail the night

programme.title: Almas Not Normal
programme.desc: Alma bags herself a talent agent and lands an acting role that turns out to be completely demoralising. Meanwhile, Lin is back in hospital and has discovered a penchant for witchcraft, while Almas best mate Leanne has transformed a truck into a bar thats become Boltons biggest hot-spot. Comedy, written by and starring Sophie Willan, with Jayde Adams, Lorraine Ashbourne and Siobhan Finneran

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Rachel is blindsided by an unexpected arrival, and Armonds renewed commitment to sobriety is put to the test. Meanwhile, Tanyas attention turns to an intriguing hotel guest

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: While Daenerys meets her future, Bran meets the past. Elsewhere, Tommen confronts the High Sparrow, and Arya continues her training. Starring Emilia Clarke, Maisie Williams and Isaac Hempstead-Wright

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The fantasy drama continues as Tyrion strikes a deal, while Jorah and Daario undertake a difficult task as they seek to catch up with Daenerys. Back across the Narrow Sea, Jaime and Cersei try to improve their situation. Starring Peter Dinklage, Iain Glen, Nikolaj Coster-Waldau and Lena Headey

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Life in the Devon fishing port of Brixham. Spring is in the air, and the town is a hive of activity as skippers return their pleasure yachts to the water after winter in the dry dock, while the pressure is on for Brixham to look its best for the arrival of Princess Anne, who will officially open the new £20million fish market, and the start of the summer season

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: In this edition the actor explores the luxury hotels of Hong Kong. Home to more skyscrapers than any other city, he first checks in to the Mandarin in the financial district, before experiencing the Four Seasons, the only hotel with two Michelin three-star resturants, as well as the timeless Peninsula in Kowloon, which even provides a Rolls-Royce airport taxi service. He ends his stay at the Ritz-Carlton, home to the worlds highest swimming pool

programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Queen Margaery spends time with her new husband King Tommen. Elsewhere, fugitive Tyrion and Varys walk the Long Bridge of Volantis, and in Braavos, Arya sees the Many-Faced God. Fantasy drama, starring Natalie Dormer and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King (2003)
programme.desc: As hobbits Frodo and Sam near the end of their journey into the dark lands of Mordor to destroy the One Ring, the evil Sauron unleashes the full might of his armies on Middle-earth. Meanwhile, Aragorn must fulfil his destiny of becoming king by leading his people into a climactic battle with the forces of darkness. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen and Sean Astin

programme.title: Darkest Hour (2017)
programme.desc: May 1940. As the Nazis advance against Britains European allies, newly elected prime minister Winston Churchill must decide whether to leave neighbouring countries to their fate, by striking a peace deal with Hitler, or fight on against terrifying odds for the greater good. Double Oscar and Bafta-winning period drama, starring Gary Oldman, Lily James and Kristin Scott Thomas

programme.title: E.T.: The Extra-Terrestrial (1982)
programme.desc: A lonely boy befriends an alien who has been left stranded on Earth. The two develop a psychic connection as the boy helps the extraterrestrial to contact his own people and call for rescue. However, living on Earth starts to have a devastating effect on the visitors health, and a government operative is determined to capture him for study. Steven Spielbergs sci-fi fantasy, starring Henry Thomas, Drew Barrymore, Dee Wallace and Peter Coyote

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon (2025)
programme.desc: On the isle of Berk, where Vikings and dragons have been enemies for generations, young warrior Hiccup breaks tradition by forming an unlikely bond with Toothless, a feared Night Fury. Live action fantasy adventure, starring Mason Thames, Nico Parker and Gerard Butler

programme.title: Jurassic Park (1993)
programme.desc: Scientists are given a sneak preview of a safari park inhabited by genetically engineered dinosaurs created by an eccentric tycoon. However, it all goes wrong when a greedy employee sabotages the security systems, allowing the prehistoric beasts to roam free and hunt the visitors. Steven Spielbergs action adventure, starring Sam Neill, Laura Dern, Jeff Goldblum, Richard Attenborough and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring (2001)
programme.desc: An unassuming hobbit is plunged into a battle against the forces of darkness when his uncle bequeaths him a magical ring of immense power. He joins a fellowship of heroes to embark on a perilous quest to destroy the ring before it falls into the hands of its creator - a dark lord who needs it to regain his power and conquer the world. The first part of Peter Jacksons epic fantasy trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Elijah Wood, Ian McKellen, Viggo Mortensen, Sean Astin, Christopher Lee, Liv Tyler and Orlando Bloom

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers (2002)
programme.desc: Frodo and Sam continue their quest to destroy the all-powerful ring, bringing them face to face with the magical artefacts twisted former owner Gollum. Meanwhile, their allies prepare to make a desperate last stand against the vast armies of the corrupted wizard Saruman, who has declared war on a neighbouring kingdom. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Sean Astin, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen, Billy Boyd, Dominic Monaghan, Andy Serkis and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King (2003)
programme.desc: As hobbits Frodo and Sam near the end of their journey into the dark lands of Mordor to destroy the One Ring, the evil Sauron unleashes the full might of his armies on Middle-earth. Meanwhile, Aragorn must fulfil his destiny of becoming king by leading his people into a climactic battle with the forces of darkness. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen and Sean Astin

programme.title: The Kings Speech (2010)
programme.desc: The younger son of George V struggles to cope with an uncontrollable stammer, prompting his wife to enlist the aid of an eccentric Australian speech therapist. The support and friendship of the doctor prove invaluable when a crisis places the repressed prince on the throne, just as the outbreak of the Second World War leaves the country in need of a strong king. Oscar-winning fact-based drama, starring Colin Firth, Geoffrey Rush, Helena Bonham Carter and Guy Pearce

programme.title: Anora (2024)
programme.desc: A sex worker marries the son of an oligarch, but his family in Russia try to get the marriage annulled. Writer/director Sean Bakers Oscar-winning romantic comedy, starring Mikey Madison, Paul Weissman and Lindsey Normington

programme.title: Goodfellas (1990)
programme.desc: An Irish-Italian boy from a poor neighbourhood grows up idolising the glamorous lifestyle of the Mafia. Taken under the wing of a mobster, he rises quickly in the world of organised crime. But he soon has to face the realities of murder and treachery, while his involvement in drug deals puts him at risk from both sides of the law. Martin Scorseses crime drama, starring Ray Liotta, Robert De Niro and an Oscar-winning Joe Pesci

programme.title: To Catch a Killer (2023)
programme.desc: Eleanor is a talented but troubled young rookie detective wrestling with the demons of her past, when she is called to the scene of a brutal mass shooting - the work of a new and terrifying murderer. The police and FBI launch a nationwide manhunt, but are thwarted at every turn by the killers enigmatic, and unprecedented behaviour. Despite her lack of experience, Eleanor is drawn deeper into the case as she, and her newfound mentor, realise that she may be the only person, given her own tortured psyche, who can understand the mind of this singular killer. Thriller, starring Shailene Woodley, Ben Mendelsohn and Ralph Ineson

programme.title: Gunpowder Milkshake (2021)
programme.desc: In her turbulent life as a professional assassin, Scarlet was cruelly forced to abandon her daughter Sam and go on the run. Years later, despite the estrangement, Sam has also grown up into a cold-blooded hitwoman. After a high-stakes mission spins out of control, Sam has no choice but to go rogue. This ultimately leads her back to her mother and her former sidekicks, who join forces against those who took everything from them. Action thriller, starring Karen Gillan and Lena Headey

programme.title: The Hanging Sun (2022)
programme.desc: Fleeing from his ex-employer, John, a reluctant assassin, seeks refuge in an isolated village, where he is faced with events that test his conscience. Drama based on the Jo Nesbo novel, starring Alessandro Borghi, Jessica Brown Findlay, Peter Mullan and Charles Dance

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal (1973)
programme.desc: A group of conspirators contracts the Jackal, a professional hitman, to assassinate President Charles de Gaulle of France. The killer starts to put his painstaking plans into action, creating a new identity, establishing his alibi and commissioning a custom-made weapon, while out-foxing the French police at every turn. Fred Zinnemanns adaptation of Fredericks Forsyth thriller, with Edward Fox, Michael Lonsdale, Alan Badel, Tony Britton and Cyril Cusack

programme.title: Collateral (2004)
programme.desc: A Los Angeles taxi driver picks up a sharp-suited fare and is shocked when a dead body almost plunges through his windscreen during the first stop on the journey. The enigmatic passenger then reveals he is a hitman with four more contracts to carry out before the night is over, and forces the driver to help him. Michael Manns thriller, starring Tom Cruise and Jamie Foxx

programme.title: Gunpowder Milkshake (2021)
programme.desc: In her turbulent life as a professional assassin, Scarlet was cruelly forced to abandon her daughter Sam and go on the run. Years later, despite the estrangement, Sam has also grown up into a cold-blooded hitwoman. After a high-stakes mission spins out of control, Sam has no choice but to go rogue. This ultimately leads her back to her mother and her former sidekicks, who join forces against those who took everything from them. Action thriller, starring Karen Gillan and Lena Headey

programme.title: Fight or Flight (2024)
programme.desc: A mercenary is assigned a target on a flight, but when rival assassins board the plane, the hunter and the hunted are forced to team up. Action thriller, starring Josh Hartnett, Katee Sackhoff and Julian Kostov

programme.title: Shooter (2007)
programme.desc: A former Marine sniper is coaxed back into action when government officials need his help to prevent an assassination attempt on the US president. However, the intended target is in fact an African archbishop, and the marksman is set up by double-crossing agents to take the fall, forcing him to go on the run as he fights to clear his name. Action thriller, with Mark Wahlberg, Michael Pena and Danny Glover

programme.title: Collateral (2004)
programme.desc: A Los Angeles taxi driver picks up a sharp-suited fare and is shocked when a dead body almost plunges through his windscreen during the first stop on the journey. The enigmatic passenger then reveals he is a hitman with four more contracts to carry out before the night is over, and forces the driver to help him. Michael Manns thriller, starring Tom Cruise and Jamie Foxx

programme.title: Pulp Fiction (1994)
programme.desc: A series of interlinked stories about the Los Angeles underworld. A hitman plays minder to his bosss wife, and he and his partner deal with a dead body following a mishap with a gun. Meanwhile, a washed-up boxer goes on the run after refusing to throw a fight, and two lovers plot a hold-up in a diner. Quentin Tarantinos crime drama, starring John Travolta, Samuel L Jackson, Uma Thurman, Bruce Willis, Ving Rhames, Tim Roth and Amanda Plummer

programme.title: To Catch a Killer (2023)
programme.desc: Eleanor is a talented but troubled young rookie detective wrestling with the demons of her past, when she is called to the scene of a brutal mass shooting - the work of a new and terrifying murderer. The police and FBI launch a nationwide manhunt, but are thwarted at every turn by the killers enigmatic, and unprecedented behaviour. Despite her lack of experience, Eleanor is drawn deeper into the case as she, and her newfound mentor, realise that she may be the only person, given her own tortured psyche, who can understand the mind of this singular killer. Thriller, starring Shailene Woodley, Ben Mendelsohn and Ralph Ineson

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer (2025)
programme.desc: A group of friends are terrorised by a stalker who knows about a gruesome secret from their past. Horror reboot, starring Madelyn Cline and Chase Sui Wonders

programme.title: Bring Her Back (2025)
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Andy and his visually impaired younger stepsister Piper discover their father dead in the shower. Single mother Laura agrees to take in Andy and Piper until the traumatised youngster comes of age and can apply for legal guardianship of his stepsister. Hoever, when events inside Lauras home spiral out of control, Andy fears he is losing his mind. Thriller, starring Billy Barratt, Sora Wong and Sally Hawkins

programme.title: The Gentleman (2025)
programme.desc: An elderly gentleman, haunted by a brutal murder, embarks on a quest for vengeance, navigating a complex web of emotions and moral dilemmas. Thriller, starring Ron Perlman

programme.title: One More Shot (2025)
programme.desc: On New Years Eve 1999, a young woman discovers a bottle of time travelling tequila, and each shot takes her back to the start of the night. Comedy, starring Emily Browning, Aisha Dee and Sean Keenan

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: Coyotes (2025)
programme.desc: Trapped in their Hollywood Hills home, a family fights for survival when caught between a raging wildfire and a pack of savage coyotes. Comedy thriller, starring Justin Long, Mila Harris and Brittany Allen

programme.title: Icefall (2025)
programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover hes aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene

programme.title: Sketch (2025)
programme.desc: When a young girls sketchbook slips into a mysterious pond, her drawings burst into life. As her once-quiet town spirals into chaos, she and her divided family must come together to track down the creatures they never meant to unleash. Writer/director Seth Worleys fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and DArcy Carden

programme.title: Materialists (2025)
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a clients wedding, Lucy meets the grooms brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Songs romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.desc: Trapped in their Hollywood Hills home, a family fights for survival when caught between a raging wildfire and a pack of savage coyotes. Comedy thriller, starring Justin Long, Mila Harris and Brittany Allen

Documentary by acclaimed film-maker Errol Morris

programme.title: Man on Wire (2008)
programme.desc: Oscar-winning documentary about French street performer Philippe Petit. In 1974 he undertook a daring 45-minute tightrope walk and acrobatic routine on a wire stretched between the two towers of the World Trade Centre. Featuring re-creations of his earlier stunts at Pariss Notre Dame cathedral and Sydney Harbour Bridge

programme.title: Combat Trains

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: As the 800th anniversary of the signing of Magna Carta in June 1215 approaches, Tony Robinson sets out to discover the real King John. His walk across the medieval monarchs stamping grounds of Sherwood Forest and the Peak District reveals a hapless man stumbling from crisis to crisis who, in the end, had no choice but to sign away some of his power. In the midst of what are now cultivated fields, Tony finds the scant remains of Laxton Castle, once the control centre where strict forest law was administered and where taxes and fines flooded into the royal coffers. Later, in Sherwood, he explores how the myth of Robin Hood has helped to skew the publics image of King John

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: Mountain climbers in California find the body of a US Army soldier, strange bundles of canvas and wood are discovered on an Alaskan mountain and volcanic glass is found in an unexpected place. A vital Second World War weather station is uncovered

First, a look at the reign of Henry VIII, remembered for his six marriages, the brutal treatment of his spouses and separating the Church of England from papal authority

programme.title: Killer Kings
programme.desc: The Roman Emperor Caligula, also known as Gaius, exploring his brief but brutal reign from AD 37 to 41, highlighting his initial popular policies - cutting taxes and pardoning exiles - which were followed by a descent into madness and tyrannical behaviour. This documentary delves into the historical context of his rule and the events surrounding his assassination

programme.desc: The search for Pablo Escobar as told by US Drug Enforcement Administration agents, with never-before-seen footage of Escobars life and capture

programme.title: Historys Deadliest with Ving Rhames
programme.desc: Isolated, deadly and unforgettable. Places like Iwo Jima, Devils Island and Snake Island, these islands are home to some of historys darkest stories

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed with Danny Trejo
programme.desc: From Nazi bunkers buried in sand and a supernova caught on camera. These discoveries prove historys blasts from the past can shake our world today

programme.title: The UnBelievable with Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: History is full of legendary missions, some so bizarre that they sound like fiction. From a covert operation involving toilet paper to a war sparked by a tree

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: Preserved in the ice of Mexicos highest peak, a group of climbers stumbles upon the bizarre, mummified remains of a man in a pinstripe business suit. Experts uncover possible drug cartel connections and a plane crash shrouded in secrecy

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: A salvage team discovers the mysterious remains of an enormous shipwreck near Cambridge Bay in the icy waters of the Canadian Arctic. Experts investigate and uncover a cutting-edge vessel with links to one of the greatest polar explorers in history

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: Mountain climbers in California find the body of a US Army soldier, strange bundles of canvas and wood are discovered on an Alaskan mountain and volcanic glass is found in an unexpected place. A vital Second World War weather station is uncovered

programme.title: Killer Kings
programme.desc: The case against six formidable kings who have left an indelible mark on the world and a look at new evidence that could lead to the world looking at them in a different light. First, a look at the reign of Henry VIII, remembered for his six marriages, the brutal treatment of his spouses and separating the Church of England from papal authority

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Mike and Avery try to get an auctioneer to help them downsize their collections, but Avery scares him off. Frame issues leave Mikes restoration of a Diamond T truck dead in the water

programme.title: Death Coast
programme.desc: Jeff MacKinnons team searches Scatarie Island for the Fevershams lost fortune. Battling brutal currents, they uncover artifacts that may lead to treasure. The clues push them closer to the deadly shores that have claimed countless lives for centuries

programme.title: Death Coast
programme.sub-title: Into the Eye of the Storm
programme.desc: Jeff MacKinnons team battles thick kelp, brutal currents and a looming storm while searching Scatarie Islands coast. Just as the storm hits, they make a crucial discovery - a clue that could lead to the long-lost wrecks and hidden treasure

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The staff examine items signed by President Franklin D Roosevelt, as well as a rare photograph taken during baseball star Babe Ruths debut season

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick checks out a 1939 Superman doll, while Corey has a jam on a 1952 Fender Telecaster

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The women from Vegas meet Dave, who promptly takes their locker away, leaving them only scraps. Kenny uses Mary as a Dave shield and the two find a decent unit of their own

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The Vegas women try their own bidding style, Brandi and Jarrod try to phone it in and Kenny and his brother show everyone that family comes second

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene steals the units in Rancho Palos Verdes, California, Marys locker reveals a sticky past and Justin demonstrates he can turn a small investment into a big return

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Emily deals with an all-male day, while Justin seeks Ivys guidance with his vintage Cadillac parts. Kenny speaks up during the auction - and quickly regrets it

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: Anglo Saxon Gold and Rebellious Nuns
programme.desc: Alice Roberts joins archaeologists to explore Central Englands past. She explores a dig beneath the runways of RAF Alconbury, which has uncovered a rural Roman site filled with mysteriously placed objects. In Winchester she visits a new housing development where an Anglo-Saxon cemetery has been discovered and a gold pendant has been found in a grave. She also tours a medieval nunnery near Windsor where archaeologists are attempting to learn about the women who lived within the convent

programme.title: Great British Castle Rescue
programme.desc: Rick Edwards takes an aerial and up-close view of Gwrych Castle in Conwy County Borough, Wales

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Perched high on a volcanic crag overlooking the River Forth, Stirling has long been one of the most strategically important castles in Britain. Guarding the gateway to the Highlands, its battle-scarred walls have witnessed savagery and chivalry, intrigue, alchemy, adultery and murder. With the aid of location filming, aerial shots and dramatic reconstructions, Dan Jones examines the history of this stronghold and relates the stories of some of the powerful characters who have owned it over the centuries

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the history of Carrickfergus Castle in Co Antrim, one of the most ancient castles in Northern Ireland and a stronghold key to understanding the tempestuous relationship between Britain and Ireland. Dan travels to Rathlin island, where he reveals how hundreds of women and children were massacred in the name of Elizabeth I, and visits the tomb of former governor Arthur Chichester, who began a new colonisation strategy using scorched earth tactics and laid waste to much of the land surrounding the town

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the turbulent history of six of Britains most famous castles, his journey commencing with a visit to Edinburgh Castle. A popular tourist attraction to this day, Dan explores the history of this famous stronghold that began as an Iron Age battle base and remains a military facility to this day, and was the target of the worlds first aerial bombing

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the history of the Welsh capitals landmark, Cardiff Castle, and discovers more about its various incarnations over the centuries. Dan learns about the many famous figures throughout history who have spent time within its walls, and discovers more about its redevelopment in the 19th century by architect William Burges, who transformed it into the Victorian gothic fantasy it remains today

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Following two of Americas most skilled pickers, who trawl junk yards, garages, attics and barns for precious objects

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are tasked with recreating an iconic fighting knife from the 20th century - the Fairbairn Sykes. However, replicating the blade is only half the challenge as they must also combine three different sizes of W1 round stock to forge their weapon. Later, two smiths then forge Japanese General Yamashitas gunto

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Part one of three. Kira and OBrien try to bring peace to the Bajoran race by rescuing a resistance fighter from a Cardassian slave-labour colony. Starring Avery Brooks and Nana Visitor

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Apophis battles with the team to find the Harsesis child, a being that could prove the undoing of the Goauld should it fall into the wrong hands. Sci-fi adventure, starring Richard Dean Anderson

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Part two of two. The Doctor reconsiders his decision to betray the ship and accompany his fellow holograms. Sci-fi adventure, starring Robert Picardo

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise crew members fall victim to a mysterious disease that causes them to act in a drunken manner - with potentially fatal consequences as they career toward a star on the verge of exploding. Starring Patrick Stewart and Wil Wheaton

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: A high-speed chase through the streets of London ensues when Christine Johnson and the military invade the ARC in search of a mysterious artefact. Forced to take refuge in an old hut in the woods, Abby, Sarah and the teams sense of safety is short-lived when an anomaly opens nearby and they find themselves besieged by giant terror birds. Elsewhere, Jack faces trouble of a different kind when he hosts a game of poker. Hannah Spearritt, Laila Rouass and Robert Lowe star

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team races to find the suspect who murdered the president of the New York Federal Reserve and may be connected to one of Jubals past cases

programme.title: FBI: Most Wanted
programme.desc: A single mother goes on a deadly rampage at a Public Defenders office. Elsewhere, Jess worries how Tali is handling life without her mother

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick, Hank and Wu investigate claims that a man was consumed by a tree-like Wesen

programme.title: Warrior
programme.sub-title: Not for a Drink, a F***, or a God Damn Prayer
programme.desc: A guilty Mai Ling tries to make things right with Ah Sahm, who is more intent than ever on seeking revenge, while Penny finds her business in trouble and learns that Ah Sahm has been using her. Ah Toy pays an emotional visit to Nellies Sonoma winery and Bill and Chao put their plot against the Fung Hai into action

programme.title: The Force: Manchester
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of Greater Manchester Police, which is Englands second-largest force and is responsible for protecting 2.7 million people

programme.title: Brit Cops
programme.desc: Documentary following Britains police as they wage war against crime, this week charting the admirable efforts of police teams from Wales

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Following Australias traffic enforcers as they deal with high-speed chases, defiant hooligans and explosive crashes

programme.title: Pride Rules
programme.desc: This documentary takes a look at lion prides, their politics, their incessant drive to survive, and the daily struggles they face to protect their territory

programme.title: Predators
programme.desc: A notorious brotherhood of cheetahs rule the southern plains of the Serengeti, until a raging bushfire turns their world upside down

programme.title: Tusker: Brotherhood of Elephants
programme.desc: An insight into the lives of elephant bulls in Mount Kilimanjaro and Amboseli, following their drive for dominance and the subtle social bonds that form between them

programme.title: Natures Dress Code: Who Wears What and Why?
programme.desc: Every living creature, from the amoeba to the blue whale, needs a suitable coat. Dive deep into the fashion styles of the natural world with this colourful documentary

programme.title: Waterworld Africa
programme.desc: An unusual colony of penguins on the south-western tip of Africa, driven there by human interference on their island homes

programme.title: Waterworld Africa
programme.desc: Life in the savannahs is ruled by water, so when harsh drought conditions prevail during the long dry season, waterholes become a coveted, crowded place

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: A look at the lives of animals, a penguin uses a small pebble to symbolise his proposal, while a lemur in Madagascar uses millipedes as a form of pest control

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: A line of hermit crabs prepare for a very orderly house swap on a Belize beach. Plus, a chimpanzee that keeps a cat as a pet

programme.title: Big Cats Small World
programme.desc: Part one of two. The lives of three rival species, lions, leopards and cheetahs, revealing the strategies each has evolved to coexist in their shared world

programme.title: Big Cats Small World
programme.desc: Part two of two. Molelos pride are exhausted when the winter floods arrive. The cheetah cubs make a difficult decision, and a scary encounter makes leopard mum Sephiri choose between her old family and her new cubs

programme.title: Ocean Parks
programme.desc: Profiles of the worlds most spectacular marine habitats, beginning with the Caribbean island of Bonaire, a leading destination for eco-tourists

programme.title: Baboons: Rules of the Troop
programme.desc: Cameras follow four different species of baboons who have conquered African deserts, coasts, savannah and mountains, adapting to the challenges of their environment along the way

programme.title: Into the Wild: Colombia
programme.desc: Some of the remarkable animals that call Colombia home. In the heart of the rainforest, a young capuchin monkey must master his climbing skills, source his food and learn to distinguish friend from foe

programme.title: Wild Animal Babies
programme.desc: Patrick Aryee examines the first days, weeks and months of young animals, beginning by looking at how single offspring depend on their mothers

programme.title: Wild Animal Babies
programme.desc: Patrick Aryee explores how some siblings quickly forge lifelong bonds, while others compete ferociously from the moment theyre born

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Natural History Museum Alive
programme.desc: The broadcaster invites viewers to join him as he takes an after-hours stroll around one of his favourite places, the Natural History Museum. But this is no ordinary tour as some of the many exhibits spring to life as the veteran naturalist strolls along

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough employs the latest technologies to explore the violence, rivalries and deadly weaponry existing within the world of bugs. This first episode examines the survival tactics of its terrifying residents including killer ants, trap-setting spiders and beetles with the ability to shoot boiling chemicals at their enemies

programme.title: Tusker: Brotherhood of Elephants
programme.desc: An insight into the lives of elephant bulls in Mount Kilimanjaro and Amboseli, following their drive for dominance and the subtle social bonds that form between them

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Wild City
programme.desc: With the latest film-making technology, the veteran broadcaster uncovers the unseen natural treasures of Singapore and explores how the has adapted to humans

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Wild City
programme.desc: The veteran broadcaster narrates a day in the animal life of Singapores urban environments, from a troop of suburban macaques to a family of otters in Marina Bay

programme.title: Shark with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Naturalist and shark expert Steve Backshall celebrates the dazzling diversity of sharks, uncovering their secret lives and the threats they face. He begins by exploring the radical variety of sharks in the Atlantic Ocean and marks the start of a global journey in the so-called shark capital of the world, the Bahamas

programme.title: Shark with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: The naturalist learns about the sharks of the Indian Ocean, which despite finding ways to adapt to the environment, face threats from climate change, pollution and overfishing

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: Documentary revealing the secrets and ingenious tactics of natures toughest fighters in their battles for survival. Narrated by Sean Bean

programme.title: Tusker: Brotherhood of Elephants
programme.desc: An insight into the lives of elephant bulls in Mount Kilimanjaro and Amboseli, following their drive for dominance and the subtle social bonds that form between them

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: In 2020, Australia went up in flames. The scale and intensity signified an undeniable new phase in the global climate crisis. For Australias wildlife, who have adapted to severities of weather, it was cataclysmic. And for those who did survive, the real challenge only now begins. This documentary examines the toll, the recovery and the healing of the wild after Australias wildfires

programme.title: Impossible Animals
programme.desc: Patrick Aryee examines the animals that live on the coast. From crashing waves to extreme tides, surviving here takes ingenuity and incredible adaptations

programme.title: Planet Weird
programme.desc: The partnership between clownfish and anemones, as well as the quid-pro-poo agreements of dung beetles and pitcher plants

programme.title: Planet Weird
programme.desc: The world of the cannibalistic portia spider as it devours the competition, as well as the bloodthirsty side of cuddly koalas and an epic giraffe battle

programme.title: Cub Camp

programme.title: Cub Camp

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II (1987)
programme.desc: Wisecracking Detroit detective Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles to investigate the shooting of an old friend, and uncovers a connection with a spate of violent robberies carried out by a criminal who leaves a mysterious calling card. Comedy thriller sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, John Ashton, Ronny Cox and Brigitte Nielsen.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III (1994)
programme.desc: Maverick cop Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles when an investigation into a colleagues murder leads him to a Hollywood theme park. He enlists the help of old ally Rosewood to prove the resort is a cover for a major counterfeiting ring connected to a terrorist conspiracy. Comedy adventure sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Theresa Randle and Bronson Pinchot.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop (1984)
programme.desc: Fast-talking Detroit cop Axel Foley heads for Los Angeles after an old friend is murdered before his eyes. His search for the killers leads him into conflict with a seemingly untouchable drug kingpin, but he also has to contend with the local force, who do not want him taking matters into his own hands. Comedy thriller, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Ronny Cox, John Ashton and Steven Berkoff

programme.title: Pretty in Pink (1986)
programme.desc: Misfit high-school girl Andie Walsh unexpectedly attracts the attentions of a rich, popular boy, but the course of true love runs far from smoothly when their two worlds collide. Romantic drama, starring Molly Ringwald, Andrew McCarthy, James Spader, Jon Cryer and Harry Dean Stanton

programme.title: The First Wives Club (1996)
programme.desc: Three former college friends reunite at the funeral of a mutual acquaintance, who killed herself after her husband left her for a younger woman. Finding themselves in a similar situation, the trio decide to take action and hit their former partners where it hurts most - their finances. Comedy, starring Goldie Hawn, Bette Midler, Diane Keaton, Maggie Smith, Dan Hedaya, Bronson Pinchot and Elizabeth Berkley

programme.title: Hope Springs (2012)
programme.desc: A middle-aged married woman feels her long-standing relationship with her unadventurous husband is becoming stale. When she hears of a marriage counsellor offering therapy sessions in his remote retreat, she persuades her reluctant spouse to join her for a week with the doctor rediscovering why they fell in love in the first place. Romantic comedy, with Meryl Streep, Tommy Lee Jones and Steve Carell

programme.title: Arthur (1981)
programme.desc: Boozy playboy Arthur Bach is content to drift through life without ambition and await the multimillion-dollar inheritance due to him following an arranged high-society wedding. However, on the threshold of the nuptials, Arthur falls for a penniless shoplifter and begins to doubt whether he wants to go through with the ceremony. Comedy, starring Dudley Moore, Liza Minnelli and an Oscar-winning John Gielgud

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing (2002)
programme.desc: A woman more interested in one-night stands than true love is forced to reassess her priorities after meeting the man of her dreams. However, when she hears he is getting married, she sets out on a hectic road trip across America to stop the wedding. Romantic comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Christina Applegate, Selma Blair and Thomas Jane

programme.title: Tootsie (1982)
programme.desc: A New York actors difficult reputation has rendered him unemployable. When a TV soap advertises a new female role, he disguises himself as a woman for the audition - and wins the part. But the character proves so popular, he is forced to keep up the pretence indefinitely. Comedy, starring Dustin Hoffman, Jessica Lange and Bill Murray. Directed by Sydney Pollack, who makes a cameo appearance as Hoffmans agent

programme.desc: An idealistic lawyer catches the attention of a real-estate tycoon, who offers her a job. She starts out thinking she can change his venal ways, but quickly tires of running his life for him. Finding himself in desperate need of her support, the self-absorbed millionaire pulls out all the stops to win her back. Romantic comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Hugh Grant, Alicia Witt and Dana Ivey

programme.desc: A lonely and past-his-prime American actor travels to Japan to film a commercial. During a depressing night in the hotel bar, he meets a spirited younger woman and the pair strike up a close friendship, exploring Tokyo and helping each other face the mundanities of everyday life. Sofia Coppolas comedy drama, starring Bill Murray, Scarlett Johansson and Giovanni Ribisi

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Part one of two. Samantha Carter battles to access her memories of Jolinar to save her father, who has been captured by the evil Goauld System Lord Sokar. Sci-fi drama, starring Amanda Tapping

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Worf and Dax embark on a hazardous mission behind enemy lines, and despite the difficulty of the journey, it proves to be almost like a honeymoon for the newlyweds. But danger is just around the corner when Jadzia is critically injured by a JemHadar patrol, leaving her husband facing the almost impossible dilemma of choosing between love and duty. Sci-fi drama, with Michael Dorn and Terry Farrell

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.sub-title: Wrongs Darker Than Death or Night
programme.desc: Kira travels back in time to discover the truth about her mother, only to find herself in a Bajoran refugee camp at the beck and call of a group of lustful Cardassian officers. Starring Nana Visitor

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: High-ranking investigating officers infiltrate the station and force Sisko to allow them free rein. Unfortunately, the questioning soon takes a sinister turn as Bashir finds his motivation for taking part in dangerous missions being called into question. Starring Avery Brooks and Alexander Siddig

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko tries to trick the Romulans into declaring war against the Dominion, realising that to save the Federation, he must betray several of its core principles

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Dr Bashirs hologram nightclub guest singer, Vic Fontaine, turns out to be an expert on personal relationships, and tries to help Odo overcome his inhibitions. Sci-fi drama, starring Rene Auberjonois and Avery Brooks

programme.title: The Leftovers
programme.sub-title: The Most Powerful Man in the World (and His Identical Twin Brother)
programme.desc: On a mission of mercy, Kevin assumes an alternate identity. Mystery drama, starring Justin Theroux, Amy Brenneman, Christopher Eccleston and Liv Tyler

programme.title: The Leftovers
programme.desc: In the final episode, Nora makes the decision to enter Dr Eden and Dr Bekkers experimental machine. Before the procedure, she and Matt reminisce on their orphaned childhood and she bids farewell to her brother

programme.title: Oldboy (2003)
programme.desc: A man is abducted and locked away in a small room for 15 years then suddenly set free, with no explanation for why he was incarcerated. Bewildered and disorientated, he struggles to adapt to his new-found freedom, but vows to find out what has become of his family and who his captors were so he can mete out his own brand of revenge. Thriller, directed by Park Chan-wook, starring Choi Min-sik, Gang Hye-jung and Yu Ji-tae. In Korean

programme.desc: Four American soldiers being transported to military prison through Nazi-occupied France escape when their convoy is attacked. Initially planning to escape to neutral Switzerland, they end up helping the French resistance steal a V2 rocket. Second World War thriller, starring Bo Svenson and Peter Hooten and Fred Williamson.

programme.title: Flipping Profit
programme.desc: Fine art dealer Gavin Claxton, trader Linda Lambert and master upholsterer Anthony Devine head to Oxford to search for bargains

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping programming bringing you a selection of innovative products

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping programming bringing you a selection of innovative products

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Flo Headlam head to Leicester to create a garden for visually impaired Luigi and his wife Julie. The couple need a garden that is safe for Luigi to get around without any trip hazards and have plenty of shade for him to relax with family and friends. Charlie and Flo set out to transform the uneven, higgledy piggledy plot into the ideal space on a budget of £6,000

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: Mark Evans meets more people who aspire to live in their ultimate waterside dream home. Simon and Mary Sparrow live on a barge in Beccles, Suffolk, with their son Nate and their two cats. The Sparrows have been running a boatyard for nearly 10 years, specialising in refurbishing and renting out floating homes to holidaymakers. Now theyre designing and building a new, one-of-a-kind floating home for themselves - a futuristic-looking floating pod, drawing on a budget of £70,000

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: Alan and Val McCoy put their life savings on the line to make their dream of living on water come true, entrusting a boat builder to make them their dream narrow boat floating home. The couple have been together for 11 years and now that theyre retired, theyve decided that owning a narrow boat could be a unique way to be near their families - all of whom live along the canal system across the Midlands and north-west England

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: This edition charts the exploits of Pat and Sue Willan, who now retired plan to buy their very last floating home, which they hope to keep moored on the Thames. They have enlisted the help of a boat-maker in Stoke and opted for a 35-tonne, 55-foot state-of-the-art, all-mod-cons Dutch barge. They have a healthy budget of over £400,000 and elaborate plans for very contemporary kitchen fittings and gadgets and a powerful hydraulic engine

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: South African-born Linda, her husband Mark and Coco the cat share a one-bedroom floating home on Taggs Island in Hampton, Surrey. Its an idyllic location, but their home is also their workplace and its starting to feel a bit cramped. The couple want to stay put in their exclusive location, so Linda has hatched an ambitious plan to buy the boat next door and do it up all by herself. Its a huge challenge and it remains to be seen whether enthusiasm and passion will be enough to get the job done

programme.title: Waking Ned (1998)
programme.desc: An old man wins the lottery, then immediately drops dead of shock. Eager to get their hands on the money, two of his friends pretend he is still alive - and soon have the entire community conspiring to keep up the pretence in return for a share of the jackpot. Comedy, starring David Kelly, Ian Bannen, James Nesbitt, Fionnula Flanagan and Susan Lynch

programme.title: Vendetta for the Saint (1969)
programme.desc: The suave anti-hero investigates a murder in Naples, but ends up facing the Sicilian Mafia. Action adventure, starring Roger Moore, Ian Hendry and Rosemary Dexter

programme.title: Puppet on a Chain (1971)
programme.desc: An American narcotics agent is sent to Amsterdam to take down an international heroin smuggling operation. His investigation leads him to discover a connection between the drug dealers and a secretive religious order. Action thriller based on Alistair MacLeans novel, starring Sven-Bertil Taube and Barbara Parkins

programme.title: Sex and the Other Woman (1972)
programme.desc: Anthology of five comic tales of married men having affairs. A henpecked husband risks getting caught in the act, an accountants wife discovers her husband is sleeping with a colleague, a scheming seductress tries to break up her lovers marriage, a man has a relationship with his daughters schoolfriend, and a deceived wife gets a tip-off from a nosy neighbour. Comedy, starring Bartlett Mullins and Maggie Wright

programme.title: Triple Cross (1966)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War spy adventure about Eddie Chapman, a bank robber who became a British double agent in exchange for money and a full pardon. Following the German invasion of Jersey, Chapman offers to provide information to the Nazis, who are unaware his loyalties really lie with the British Secret Service. With Christopher Plummer, Trevor Howard, Yul Brynner, Romy Schneider and Claudine Auger

programme.title: Battle of Britain: Empty Skies
programme.desc: A unique insight into what it was really like to be there. Interviews with the pilots, cut with archive footage paint the picture of one of historys greatest ever air battles

programme.title: Queer Lives Today
programme.desc: Following a painful adoption journey which comes to an abrupt halt, Hollyoaks star Ross Adams explores what can be done to make the system easier for LGBTQ+ adopters.

programme.title: Flipping Profit
programme.desc: Philip Serrell, Tony Wong and Micaela Sharp search Stratford-upon-Avon for items, choosing a bottle-corking machine, some lamps and old furniture in the hope of turning a profit

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Lee Burkhill arrive in Bolton, Greater Manchester, where they set about transforming Debbies tired and overgrown plot into a relaxing Southeast Asian-inspired haven, a perfect spot to remember her late father and practise yoga. For her £3,000 budget, Debbie would like to share her garden with as much wildlife as possible and would also love a natural pond

programme.title: Becoming Jazzy Whipps
programme.desc: Jazzy Whipps is the UKs biggest deaf influencer - but success brings trolling. It takes courage and resilience to be Jazzy. Funded and supported by Together TV and BSLBT.

programme.title: New Home DIY
programme.desc: Dave Wellman is in Ramsgate restoring a period property - a masterclass in timber cladding is on

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: To mark the half-way point of their sociological experiment, Alex Langlands, Peter Ginn and Ruth Goodman explore a single day in an Edwardian farmers household. Using a cache of letters from the time found in Morwhellham to research the realities of life, the trio experience typical daily routines, from the usual early morning hair-styling and oral hygiene, to the end-of-the-day trip to the local pub

programme.title: Country House Auction
programme.desc: Egyptologist Dr Chris gets his hands on an inscribed Egyptian amulet and gives trainee auctioneer James a masterclass in ancient signs and symbols. A historical silver pin cushion, which was once owned by a leading lady of the Irish Arts and Crafts movement, piques the interest of competing buyers. Plus, auctioneer James gets up close and personal with the inner workings of some valuable watches

programme.desc: Dave Wellman is in Ramsgate restoring a period property - a masterclass in timber cladding is on

programme.title: How to Have a Better Orgasm
programme.desc: Seven women give intimate interviews about their diverse experience of orgasms, sharing a variety of stories and techniques covering a range of ages. Personal accounts reveal that, across the board, theres a turning point in understanding orgasms and learning how to have a better one. For Helen, it was her first experience of lesbian sex, which made her realise how important communication is to sex, while Sam attributes it to meeting her husband, because it was the first time someone cared about her pleasure

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Jack Mooney and the team are called to a workshop where acclaimed artist Donna Harman has been found dead. Suspicion immediately falls on the three people closest to the crime scene, but with no one entering the workshop between the time the victim returned to start on her next painting and being found dead, the scene paints a tricky picture. Only a solitary drink can seems to hold the answer, but matters are complicated when Donnas art dealer and an art collector enter the fray. Meanwhile, Jack is confused by his blossoming feelings for Anna. Whodunit, starring Ardal OHanlon, with Nina Wadia, Barbara Flynn, Louise Brealey and Vivienne Acheampong

programme.desc: When a shark spits out the arm of an ex-Navy SEAL, the teams investigation tests the loyalty of a band of former Navy divers and uncovers a murky surveillance plot

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: As the Kembleford Amateur Dramatics Society prepares to put on a pantomime, a grim incident from the groups past is unearthed. A body is found in the woods and identified as a woman who went missing from a rehearsal seven years previously. An examination of the corpse provides evidence that a man who confessed to the murder was innocent, leaving Father Brown with a miscarriage of justice to put right in time for Christmas. Crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: When a star witness in a high-profile narcotics case is murdered, the CBI team concludes the killing was the work of the drug baron he was about to testify against. However, Jane concocts an alternative theory, one that suggests the real target of the hit was the witnesss girlfriend - also found dead at the scene - whose dubious connections to local police officers suggest corruption within the force. Simon Baker stars

programme.title: Hudson and Rex
programme.desc: A viral confrontation between a murder writer and the wife of a victim leads to a seven-year-old cold case being reopened, and Rex finds previously overlooked evidence

programme.title: My Life Is Murder
programme.desc: Alexa investigates a case that runs the gamut of birth, marriage and murder when a young man is found dead in an alley after a fight at his brothers wedding. Detective thriller, starring Lucy Lawless and Bernard Curry

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Famous thriller author Frank OToole is found stabbed through the heart after taking an early morning swim in the ocean. Suspicion soon falls on the victims wife Valerie, but with eyewitnesses confirming he was swimming alone, how could anyone have got from the house to the sea without being detected? Away from the investigation, Dwayne concentrates on finding a date for a voodoo love festival. Whodunit, guest starring Simon Callow, Imogen Stubbs, and Sian Gibson of Car Share fame

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Rock n roll reaches Kembleford when a group of bikers causes outrage and excitement in equal measure. Fifties-set crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Sullivans dream of leaving Kembleford is scuppered when he is arrested for receiving stolen goods. Fifties-set crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank and Lu investigate a death threat at Runningbrook, an exclusive tennis club that hides a toxic threat. Crime drama, starring Mark Benton and Jo Joyner

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: Tracking a local conman, Frank and Lu make some unlikely allies when they encounter a pair of deadly gangsters. Mark Benton and Jo Joyner star in the comedy drama about an oddball couple of private detectives who investigate crime in Stratford-upon-Avon

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The crime-solving cleric investigates when murder threatens to derail the live broadcast of agricultural radio drama, The Muckles. Fifties-set crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams, with Martin Jarvis and Rosalind Ayres

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The suspicious death of a cowboy has Murdoch and Brackenreid investigating alongside Annie Oakley at the first Stampede in Calgary

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Roman Catholic priest joins forces with Flambeau to hunt for a priceless holy relic, while a new nemesis lurks in the shadows. Mystery drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Jack Mooney and the team are called to a workshop where acclaimed artist Donna Harman has been found dead. Suspicion immediately falls on the three people closest to the crime scene, but with no one entering the workshop between the time the victim returned to start on her next painting and being found dead, the scene paints a tricky picture. Only a solitary drink can seems to hold the answer, but matters are complicated when Donnas art dealer and an art collector enter the fray. Meanwhile, Jack is confused by his blossoming feelings for Anna. Whodunit, starring Ardal OHanlon, with Nina Wadia, Barbara Flynn, Louise Brealey and Vivienne Acheampong

programme.title: NCIS: Sydney
programme.desc: When a shark spits out the arm of an ex-Navy SEAL, the teams investigation tests the loyalty of a band of former Navy divers and uncovers a murky surveillance plot

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Roman Catholic priest joins forces with Flambeau to hunt for a priceless holy relic, while a new nemesis lurks in the shadows. Mystery drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: The Boy That Never Was
programme.desc: Three years after losing their son in an earthquake in Morocco, a couples world is turned upside down when they spot a young boy in Dublin who they believe to be him. After losing sight of the youngster, they set out on a mission to search for the truth and find him. Drama, starring Colin Morgan and Toni ORourke

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The detective apprehends a man who claims that the Devil is inside him and made him kill - and that the possessing demon is a man they both know well - James Gillies

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The detective investigates when the dog of a socialite is found dead, while the void left by Brackenreids latest absence is filled by the arrival of Detective Watts

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The detective investigates when a man claims he was kidnapped as a child 20 years earlier and is the rightful heir to a fortune

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch quickly realises that the boy who tried to avenge Annas murder is his son. Ogden is stunned but eager to accept the boy out of love for Murdoch

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: As the Kembleford Amateur Dramatics Society prepares to put on a pantomime, a grim incident from the groups past is unearthed. A body is found in the woods and identified as a woman who went missing from a rehearsal seven years previously. An examination of the corpse provides evidence that a man who confessed to the murder was innocent, leaving Father Brown with a miscarriage of justice to put right in time for Christmas. Crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: When a star witness in a high-profile narcotics case is murdered, the CBI team concludes the killing was the work of the drug baron he was about to testify against. However, Jane concocts an alternative theory, one that suggests the real target of the hit was the witnesss girlfriend - also found dead at the scene - whose dubious connections to local police officers suggest corruption within the force. Simon Baker stars

programme.title: Hudson and Rex
programme.desc: A viral confrontation between a murder writer and the wife of a victim leads to a seven-year-old cold case being reopened, and Rex finds previously overlooked evidence

programme.title: My Life Is Murder
programme.desc: Alexa investigates a case that runs the gamut of birth, marriage and murder when a young man is found dead in an alley after a fight at his brothers wedding. Detective thriller, starring Lucy Lawless and Bernard Curry

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Famous thriller author Frank OToole is found stabbed through the heart after taking an early morning swim in the ocean. Suspicion soon falls on the victims wife Valerie, but with eyewitnesses confirming he was swimming alone, how could anyone have got from the house to the sea without being detected? Away from the investigation, Dwayne concentrates on finding a date for a voodoo love festival. Whodunit, guest starring Simon Callow, Imogen Stubbs, and Sian Gibson of Car Share fame

However, one of the riders is keeping a sensitive secret. Whodunit, starring Ardal OHanlon, with Nina Wadia

programme.title: Cornwall with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the conclusion of his two-part journey, Simon investigates the environmental challenges facing Cornwall and the rest of the country. He discovers how the regions farmers are adopting new, less intensive approaches that are both more profitable and environmentally friendly, and reveals how reintroducing beavers to the uplands could tackle the problem of widespread flooding. He also encounters some of the countys iconic wildlife, including grey seals that live in constant risk of getting caught up in discarded fishing nets

programme.desc: Officers are suspicious when an elderly couple arrive from Mexico with five suitcases but no clothes, and a truck carrying garden furniture has something extra in the load

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Freddie Flintoff samples the brutal, full-contact motorsport of F1 stock cars, and Chris Harris gets to grips with Mercedes F1 car for the road, the fearsomely complicated AMG One. Paddy McGuinness takes a ride in a luxurious Range Rover

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Chris Harris and Freddie Flintoff compare a hatchback from Honda and an older one from Peugeot. Paddy McGuinness takes on his toughest challenge to date - getting a team of young amateur racers up to professional motorsport standard in just two months

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer return to Scotland for their latest fishing trip. Having failed to catch a salmon in the River Tay, they hope to have more luck on the Tweed. They begin their journey at the isolated Bemersyde Estate before moving on to the Bridge Pool at Kelso, one of the most famous salmon fishing spots in Scotland. They also try their hand at boat fishing and receive some mystical predictions from a familiar face

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer are joined by singer and conservationist Feargal Sharkey for a trip to the River Lea in Hertfordshire, where Paul used to fish for perch with his friends when he was a teenager. Bob reads up on the wise words of 17th-century angler Izaak Walton and prepares a riverside picnic that brings back fond memories and leads to a reflection on the differences between teenage life in their 1970s youth and the present. Setting up home in a narrowbooat, he also prepares a dish Pauls mother used to make - corned beef and potato pie

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore how Britains love of cheese has evolved over centuries, travelling to Scotland to sample some of its finest varieties and discovering that the original cheesecake recipes were not American but British

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: In the final instalment of their culinary journey through the history of British cuisine, Si King and Dave Myers explore comfort food, discussing how certain ingredients and recipes can give people a sense of well-being, such as chicken noodle soup and a simple fish dish

programme.title: Robson Greens Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Robson is joined by fellow actor Mark Benton to explore the Cleveland and North Yorkshire coast while sampling outdoor activities that promise to be good for the mind and body. Their road trip takes in the world-famous cliff lift in the Victorian seaside resort of Saltburn-by-the-Sea, a night in a real-life Hobbit hole, drawing lesson in the fishing port of Staithes and a bracing cold water swim in the Tees

programme.title: Cornwall with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the conclusion of his two-part journey, Simon investigates the environmental challenges facing Cornwall and the rest of the country. He discovers how the regions farmers are adopting new, less intensive approaches that are both more profitable and environmentally friendly, and reveals how reintroducing beavers to the uplands could tackle the problem of widespread flooding. He also encounters some of the countys iconic wildlife, including grey seals that live in constant risk of getting caught up in discarded fishing nets

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels through some of the most remote landscapes on Earth. He begins in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, encountering thick jungles and tropical swamps as he looks for the people and wildlife whose home is Africas greatest rainforest. His first destination is the remote village of Baka, where Simon experiences a culture based on sharing resources and respecting all living things in the rainforest

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: A gunfight in suburban Kent leaves a victim seriously wounded and starts a frenetic high-pressure race to hunt down the perpetrators

programme.title: Will and Ralf Should Know Better
programme.desc: The duo face their fears, from dangling on a trapeze and tackling fatherhood to performing stand-up comedy in front of a Glasgow crowd

programme.desc: Officers are on the lookout for day-trippers trying to smuggle prescription pills back into America, bought cheaply from one of the 200 pharmacies on the other side of the border

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Suspicions are raised when a routine x-ray reveals suspicious packages hidden inside the tyres of a pick-up truck. Officers also seize a large shipment of marijuana

programme.title: Railroad Australia
programme.desc: Bernies coal truck odyssey goes horribly wrong. Two veteran locomotives risk destruction in a race for glory, and a mega-train faces the steepest grades in Australia. Documentary shedding light on the work of railway staff responsible for transporting train passengers through the blistering heat of the vast Australian wilderness

programme.title: Rick Steins Far Eastern Odyssey
programme.desc: The chef continues his exploration of the Far Easts most diverse food cultures, travelling to Thailand where he meets one of his heroes, David Thompson, who has devoted himself to understanding Thai cuisine. programme.desc: In Pharr, 840kg of meth is discovered in the floor of a truck. Aromatic candles filled with Fentanyl are intercepted at the World Trade Bridge

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Two 16-year-olds are suspected of smuggling drugs, a man tries to enter the US with false documents, and marijuana worth $7 million dollars is found inside rolls of carpet

programme.title: Guy Martin: Proper Jobs
programme.desc: Documentary series in which Guy Martin gets stuck into doing some of the most demanding and often dangerous jobs in the UK. From working as a deckhand on a fishing trawler to taking the opportunity to work as a search and rescue dog handler in the Highlands of Scotland, the jobs that Guy undertakes require skill, physical effort and courage.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson gets behind the wheel of a Reliant Robin to investigate the reasons behind the lack of three-wheeled cars on the market. programme.title: Top Gear

programme.desc: Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer are joined by singer and conservationist Feargal Sharkey for a trip to the River Lea in Hertfordshire, where Paul used to fish for perch with his friends when he was a teenager. Bob reads up on the wise words of 17th-century angler Izaak Walton and prepares a riverside picnic that brings back fond memories and leads to a reflection on the differences between teenage life in their 1970s youth and the present. Setting up home in a narrowbooat, he also prepares a dish Pauls mother used to make - corned beef and potato pie

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore how Britains love of cheese has evolved over centuries, travelling to Scotland to sample some of its finest varieties and discovering that the original cheesecake recipes were not American but British

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: In the final instalment of their culinary journey through the history of British cuisine, Si King and Dave Myers explore comfort food, discussing how certain ingredients and recipes can give people a sense of well-being, such as chicken noodle soup and a simple fish dish

programme.title: Robson Greens Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Robson is joined by fellow actor Mark Benton to explore the Cleveland and North Yorkshire coast while sampling outdoor activities that promise to be good for the mind and body. Their road trip takes in the world-famous cliff lift in the Victorian seaside resort of Saltburn-by-the-Sea, a night in a real-life Hobbit hole, drawing lesson in the fishing port of Staithes and a bracing cold water swim in the Tees

programme.title: Cornwall with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the conclusion of his two-part journey, Simon investigates the environmental challenges facing Cornwall and the rest of the country. He discovers how the regions farmers are adopting new, less intensive approaches that are both more profitable and environmentally friendly, and reveals how reintroducing beavers to the uplands could tackle the problem of widespread flooding. He also encounters some of the countys iconic wildlife, including grey seals that live in constant risk of getting caught up in discarded fishing nets

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels through some of the most remote landscapes on Earth. He begins in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, encountering thick jungles and tropical swamps as he looks for the people and wildlife whose home is Africas greatest rainforest. His first destination is the remote village of Baka, where Simon experiences a culture based on sharing resources and respecting all living things in the rainforest

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: A gunfight in suburban Kent leaves a victim seriously wounded and starts a frenetic high-pressure race to hunt down the perpetrators

programme.title: Will and Ralf Should Know Better
programme.desc: The duo face their fears, from dangling on a trapeze and tackling fatherhood to performing stand-up comedy in front of a Glasgow crowd

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Stephen Mangan hosts an extended episode of the current affairs quiz, with Ian Hislop and Paul Merton joined by Ed Davey MP and Rachel Parris

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts the quiz, serving up a selection of questions on the subject of restaurants. Trying to come up with the answers are Alan Davies, Phill Jupitus, Sara Pascoe and Mark Watson

programme.desc: Johnny and Moira try to get a deal on a used car, while David helps Stevie put her great aunt to rest

programme.desc: Officers are on the lookout for day-trippers trying to smuggle prescription pills back into America, bought cheaply from one of the 200 pharmacies on the other side of the border

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers

programme.title: Guy Martin: Proper Jobs
programme.desc: Documentary series in which Guy Martin gets stuck into doing some of the most demanding and often dangerous jobs in the UK. From working as a deckhand on a fishing trawler to taking the opportunity to work as a search and rescue dog handler in the Highlands of Scotland, the jobs that Guy undertakes require skill, physical effort and courage.

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: The government plans to close down small hospitals in favour of larger establishments. Dr Turner and Shelagh prepare for an inspection that will decide the fate of Nonnatus House - but the staff is shocked to find Sister Ursula has no intention of helping to save the maternity home. Barbara comes to the aid of a woman from the Chinese community who is struggling to get on with her mother-in-law, and whose baby is seriously ill

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: A woman expecting her third child realises she cannot afford to care for her baby, so makes the painful decision to give it away to her wealthy but childless cousin. Shelagh befriends the woman in the next hospital bed and Dr Turner confides in Timothy about his worst fears. Sister Julienne looks for a new recruit to join the midwives, and the community prepares to celebrate the opening of a new park

programme.title: Catherine Cooksons The Moth
programme.desc: Feature-length version of the drama set at the turn of the 20th century, about the fortunes of a carpenter who moves to the country to start work in his uncles furniture business, but finds himself forced to seek employment with a beguiling woman known locally as the Moth. Jack Davenport and Justine Waddell star

programme.title: North and South
programme.desc: Margaret is drawn to Thornton despite adopting a steely resolve to aid the workers in their battle after tragedy strikes. The arrival of an unexpected visitor brings relief to Maria, whose condition has gradually deteriorated, and sparks a chain of events which causes Thornton to reach the wrong conclusion

programme.title: North and South
programme.desc: Margaret is forced to move away from Milton after tragedy strikes. However, when her godfather leaves her a substantial inheritance she makes a return to the North, where a twist of fate leads to an unexpected rendezvous

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: Grace Pearson is found dead at a local festival. Detective Inspector Sam Gillespie - to the bewilderment of newly arrived Detective Sergeant Felix Livingstone - uses Sister Boniface as his scientific adviser. She determines that Pearson died by suffocation after her head was pushed into sawdust. The investigation leads to the three Bellamy siblings, at whose home Pearson was a housemaid. Crime drama, starring Lorna Watson and Max Brown, with Belinda Lang and Robert Daws

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: The apparent suicide of a DJ leads Nikki to question her judgement in a strikingly similar case from her past and she brings the potential mistake to the attention of her colleagues, but the news threatens to have repercussions for the family of the deceased, the police and the Lyell Centre. The fresh evidence leads to the conclusion that a copycat killer is at large and Nikki finds evidence that an intruder has been entering her home. Feature-length episode of the drama, starring Emilia Fox

programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: It is January 1936, and diplomat Sir Hallam and Lady Agnes Holland (Ed Stoppard and Keeley Hawes) move into 165 Eaton Place - closely followed by his widowed mother and her wayward sister. But they also need a full serving staff, for which Lady Agnes turns to an agency run by none other than Rose Buck (Jean Marsh), who used to work at the house. Eileen Atkins, Art Malik, Anne Reid and Adrian Scarborough co-star

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Vintage comedy from Messrs Barker and Corbett, including a sketch that shows how much confusion can be caused by eavesdropping on telephone conversations

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve is on a mission to explore the Arctic at the most volatile and dangerous time of the year - the spring melt. Paddling through ever-shifting sea ice and kayaking the worlds largest fjord, he and his team are on constant alert for giant icebergs and hungry polar bears

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve travels deep into Yucatán, Mexico, on the trail of the ancient Maya. His team, including Mexican archaeologist Guillermo de Andaa, pioneering cave diver Robbie Schmittner and former Royal Marine Aldo Kane, want to explore secret caves known as the place of fear

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: The naturalist and explorer leads a team on a mission to summit a remote and unclimbed mountain in the Stauning Alps of Greenland, crossing a vast river and skiing across a glacier

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve leads a cave-diving team into the largest unexplored cave network on Earth. Below the jungles of Mexico, they push further and deeper than anyone has gone before
