programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: Barrister Robert Rinder examines real-life cases, looking at the events leading up to crimes, going through the police investigations and summing up the trials

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Gina Ward makes a surprise return to Aidensfield and Bellamy encounters a key informant who might come in useful - but finds himself in trouble when the man disappears before he can offer a tip-off about an imminent armed robbery. Meanwhile, Vernon acquires a bargain miniature railway which he hopes will impress the new estate manager, and it emerges Dr Liz Merrick may have feelings for Lord Ashfordlys recently appointed land agent. Tricia Penrose, Mark Jordon and Geoffrey Hughes star

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Dr Merrick faces a testing time when a terrified hospital patient claims her husband is trying to kill her, but Merton seems reluctant to get involved, while Vernon picks up a bargain all-purpose pest-control solution, enlisting Davids help in his eradication mission. Ginas cousin Diane arrives to help her and Phil with the wedding preparations - much to the delight of PC Crane, who is instantly smitten. Rural drama, starring Aislin McGuckin, Tricia Penrose and Mark Jordon

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Steve is forced to cover for Phil when the father-to-be discovers Gina has gone into labour two months early and rushes to the hospital to help with the nerve-racking delivery. Meanwhile, Merton is excited when it appears a drug dealer could soon be brought to justice. Drama, starring Mark Jordon, Tricia Penrose and Duncan Bell

programme.title: Agatha Christies Poirot
programme.desc: A dentist falls in love with his young assistant. His anxious wife, believing he has made plans to poison her and thereby remove the main obstacle to happiness, calls for Poirots help. Drama, starring David Suchet

programme.title: Agatha Christies Poirot
programme.desc: A wealthy banker goes missing while walking from his country house to the village post office. Poirot, who has acquired a parrot and developed a taste for conjuring tricks, bets the baffled Inspector Japp £5 he can solve the mystery without leaving his own apartment. David Suchet stars

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Theo uses his birthday to make Todd pay, Jodie resents Adam for lecturing her, Leanne worries about Sam, and Lauren puts a dampener on Ollie and Amys date

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Gary intervenes to reconcile Todd and Theo, Maggie orders Lauren to show Ollie what hes missing, Alya receives a concerning message, and Leanne overhears Megan flirting on the phone

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Todds friends rally round to support him, Adam and Jodies feuding turns dirty, Leanne consults Daniel about Sam, and Ollie chastises Maggie for meddling in his affairs

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jims old army mates join Steve at his funeral, Adams act of revenge puts Jodie on edge, Theo finds a new target, and Megans love life intrigues Leanne

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maggie frets over Bens hospital appointment, a defamatory article upsets George, Alya meets with her former boss, and Hope urges Sam to stand up to his bully

programme.title: Paul OGrady: For the Love of Dogs
programme.desc: Paul tries to train an overly eager German Shepherd puppy that does not know how or when to calm down. He also works to gain the trust of a terrified West Highland terrier too scared to even set foot on the soil outside, and works with Battersea staff to encourage the petrified dog to come out of its shell

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: The newly promoted Detective Sergeant Morse investigates when a famous international thief tries to steal a Faberge egg from an auction. The case leads to the gruesome murders of an academic and a gangster, and Morse is convinced the deaths are the work of the same man. As he struggles with his new responsibilities, he finds himself forced to mentor a younger partner (played by Poldarks Lewis Peek)

programme.title: Dont Look Back in Anger
programme.desc: Archive news documentary looking back at the headline stories of the past 20 years, focusing this week on 2015

programme.title: The Mayfair Hotel Megabuild
programme.desc: Documentary following a major construction project at Claridges, revealing the engineering challenges involved in digging out a five-storey basement, adding four new floors to the top of the hotel and creating Londons most expensive penthouse. In the first edition, Donegal miners work 24 hours a day to tunnel under the hotel by hand, while hotel manager Eugene tries hard to ensure loyal guests like David Walliams, Christian Louboutin and Damien Hirst remain undisturbed by the work going on above and below them

programme.title: Hairy Bikers: Route 66
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King embark on their most epic journey yet. They traverse Americas famous Route 66, planning to visit nine States, serving up plenty of delicious food along the way

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell present the stories of three men brought up in the care system who are trying to reconnect with the families that were taken from them. Murray Phillips was adopted from a childrens home as a young boy with his older brother Ricky, who was sent back to the childrens home when he was 12, leaving nine-year-old Murray completely devastated and confused. Eighty-seven-year-old Mark Chesterfield spent a large part of his childhood at a foundling hospital and has been trying to reclaim his identity ever since he found out at the age of 74 that he wasnt an orphan, as hed always believed, but had a mother whod wanted to be part of his life. Having traced her side of the family, he came to Long Lost Family to find out about his fathers side

programme.title: Shetland
programme.desc: Calder decides to stay on in Shetland and Tosh welcomes the support after uncovering a tattoo that sends the case in a sinister new direction. Tom Knox is identified as the main suspect in the case but a confession about his relationship with Ellen send the team back to square one

programme.title: Michael Palin in Nigeria
programme.desc: Michael continues his journey by climbing Dala Hill in the centre of the ancient city of Kano in northern Nigeria. He travels to the open-air stadium with Mohammad Adamu - whos lived in Kano all his adult life. The two explore the Hausa sport of dambe, an ancient form of boxing. Michael also meets Amina Ali Nkeki, one of the 276 schoolgirls who were kidnapped by Boko Haram in 2014

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Dawson and Casey rekindle their relationship while adding the finishing touches to Mollys Bar ahead of the grand opening. Herrmanns wife experiences complications with her pregnancy - but with the fireman otherwise engaged, Shay is left with the responsibility of caring for her. New girl Tara (Brooke Nevin) turns heads when she joins the team

programme.title: Cold Feet
programme.desc: Karen gives in to Davids demands to try for another baby, even though shes not too keen on the idea, while Pete and Jenny have parental problems of their own. Rachel and Adam move in together, but any thoughts of lasting happiness are soon shattered. Drama, starring Helen Baxendale, James Nesbitt and John Thomson

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: Arbitration show in which real, small-claims cases are adjudicated over, within a studio courtroom, by Judge Robert Rinder. After questioning the claimant, defendant and witnesses, and assessing the evidence, Judge Rinder makes a ruling on each case.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Paul Nicholas guest stars as a Swedish sailor who waits for his ship home in Bernies funeral parlour - but may not be telling the truth about the contents of the coffin hes escorting. A trio of young joyriders steal Carols car while she is attending to a patient and decide to experiment with the drugs they find in her medical bag as well as selling them on to interested parties. Rosie and Fergus struggle to get their fledgling relationship off the ground as a series of interruptions plague their dates, while Bellamy starts to wonder whether trying again with Gina is really such a good idea. With Lisa Kay, Vanessa Hehir, Mark Jordon and Tricia Penrose

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Cassie pursues a temporary art history professorship while Sam diagnoses Adam. Abigail and Donovan realise that the missing diamond from the Middleton treasure may help break the curse. Fantasy, starring Catherine Bell

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The US Navys fastest combat ships, which are capable of a turn of speed only possible due to a revolutionary water propulsion system and the chance discovery of a brand new alloy

programme.title: Ainsleys National Trust Cook Off
programme.desc: Ainsley Harriott is joined by chefs Serena Appleby and Judy Joo at Tyntesfield in Somerset to see who can create and cook the Dish of the Day this time. Ainsley collects an Ashmeads kernel apple for his maple-griddled apple, fennel and prosciutto salad with sourdough croutons, Judy brings Korean influences to her grilled chicken kale salad with miso carrot ginger dressing, and Serena shows off her summer garden frittata, radish and red onion quickle and fresh herb chimichurri

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Three bodies from Peru, Colombia and Brazil have been recovered with mysterious injuries that look like burn marks, but who or what could have inflicted them? In an attempt to uncover the perpetrator, Jeremy Wade travels further into the Amazon jungle than ever before, enlisting the help of a secretive and little-known tribe called the Matis to shed light on this unusual case

programme.title: Peter Andres 60 Minute Makeover
programme.desc: Peter Andres 60 Minute Makeover is back and bigger than ever on Quest Red. Peter and his army of helpers will be surprising deserving people across the country with a stunning home mkeover - performed in a day and brought to you in 60 minutes. In each episode one deserving person will get the surprise home makeover of a lifetime. Nominated by their friends and family they are everyday heroes with moving stories that tug at the heart.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nick is seconded to a Scotland Yard team who have arrived in Aidensfield to investigate the fatal shooting of former policeman Andrew Gerard, and risks his career to ensure justice is done. Meanwhile, local man Alan Maskell is duped into helping a couple of crooks respray stolen cars. Nick Berry stars

programme.title: A Year on Planet Earth
programme.sub-title: A Year on My Planet Earth
programme.desc: The stories of the scientists and conservationists who used pioneering techniques to uncover new behaviour, enabling the film-makers to producer this extraordinary series

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi heads to Gloucestershire to breathe new life into a two-star, 11-bedroom hotel, and reverse the establishments dwindling occupancy rates. Having bought the property 10 years ago, the owners have found their dreams of a comfortable retirement are beginning to turn sour, and disagreements over the running of the business are hampering improvements

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Paddy receives a bit of encouraging news, while Gabby gives Arthur a fresh strategy to try out

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maggie frets over Bens hospital appointment, a defamatory article upsets George, Alya meets with her former boss, and Hope urges Sam to stand up to his bully

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: Johnny Lomaxs proposal to Matron causes Nigel Harper to worry about the effect her decision will have on the hospital, and Jill comes into conflict with a strict Catholic family. Ormerod and Frankie face a tough rescue operation as they try to save an injured fisherman trapped on board a sinking ship, while Staff Nurse Taylors plans for the future are thwarted once again

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The apparent accidental death of a drug addict takes a surprising turn when the results of the post-mortem examination are revealed, and Jack finds himself confronting his own chequered past. Ewen Bremner guest-stars, with David Jason

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nicks relationship with Kate suffers when he goes for a job interview in London, and Greengrass is convicted for sheep rustling, although holes in the evidence are discovered. Meanwhile, Alan Maskell leaves the area while on bail for and unbeknown to him, his wife suffers a miscarriage at the same time. Rural police drama, starring Nick Berry

programme.title: Cold Feet
programme.desc: Adam and Rachel try to spice up their sex life by indulging their deepest darkest fantasies, while David frets over his own shortcomings between the sheets and Pete discovers the downside of fatherhood. Comedy-drama, starring Helen Baxendale, James Nesbitt, John Thomson, Fay Ripley, Robert Bathurst and Hermione Norris

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sam falls unconscious in the street, Kit encounters a witness to his assault on Mal, and Christina orders the undertakers to cheer up

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Bear makes a huge revelation, while Graham works hard to keep Joe on side and Jacob is struggling at work

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Severides reputation teeters on the edge of ruin when a paramedic accuses him of sexual misconduct. Facing a messy legal battle to clear his name and a fire department unwilling to believe his side of the story, the lieutenant fears his career may be over. Meanwhile, the past comes back to haunt Dawson as Voight seeks payback

programme.title: Spies of Terror
programme.desc: After a terrorism attack in Paris, government agents race to catch those responsible. Secret service agents work tirelessly to locate the perpetrators of the attack, under immense pressure to prevent a recurrence. Spy thriller, starring Rachida Brakni, Fleur Geffrier, Vincent Elbaz and Pierre Perrier. In French

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: Barrister Robert Rinder examines real-life cases, looking at the events leading up to crimes, going through the police investigations and summing up the trials

programme.title: Love Island USA Aftersun
programme.desc: The weekly studio show that recaps and delivers all the romantic twists, turns and favourite moments from the previous weeks five nights of the main series

programme.title: Iain Stirlings CelebAbility
programme.desc: Three friends try to win fabulous prizes by defeating Rickie Haywood-Williams, Amy Dowden, Janine Harouni and Darren Harriott in a series of bizarre games

programme.title: Unbeatable
programme.desc: Over three rounds, contestants vie to find the single unbeatable answer and streak ahead of the rest to make the final where they can win a cash prize. General knowledge quiz, hosted by Jason Manford

programme.title: Paul OGrady: For the Love of Dogs - India
programme.desc: Paul helps a traumatised dog that desperately needs to find a home, and joins Delhis vets once more as they go out and about to treat injured street dogs. However, the pooches are not the only ones needing medical attention when the presenter falls ill

programme.title: Paul OGrady: For the Love of Dogs - India
programme.desc: The comedian and dog-lover presents his final report from Delhi, where 400,000 pooches live on the streets. Paul joins in with the celebrations for Diwali, the Hindu festival of light, with the people and animals of one of Delhis oldest dog shelters. He also helps a traumatised puppy make new friends, joins medics as they rush to rescue a four-week-old street pup who may have been hit by a car and falls in love with an elderly black labrador who lives at the rescue centre. Will he be able to resist bringing the pooch back to Britain with him?

programme.title: Week in Review
programme.desc: Looking back at the main local, national and international stories of the week

programme.title: Yes Chef
programme.desc: Culinary challenge hosted by Sheree Murphy in which michelin starred chef Rupert Rowley puts three home cooks through a series of challenges, including how to make a crepe suzette

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Gift Wrapped
programme.desc: Quiz show in which three engaged couples get the chance to win their wedding gift list and a dream holiday. The betrothed pairs work together across a series of rounds to see off their opponents. Hosted by Eamonn Holmes and Ruth Langsford

programme.title: Winning Combination
programme.desc: Omid Djalili host the quiz, with Gail, Gary, Jonah, Roshan, Lisa, Rachael, Taven, Nick and Grant trying to be among the four that make the final round for chance to to win the four-digit jackpot defined by the number they were each assigned at the start

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler and Ross face two bullies at Central Perk. Monica decides to have a flutter on the stock market and Phoebe meets a long-lost family member. Comedy, guest starring Giovanni Ribisi

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The pals plan a surprise party for Rachel, but her recently separated mother and father show up. To keep the parents apart, the gang decides to have two different gatherings. Comedy, guest starring Marlo Thomas and Ron Leibman

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe catches chickenpox just as her seafaring boyfriend returns home. Joey gets a job at Chandlers company and Monica becomes obsessed with proving Richard is more neurotic than she is. American comedy, guest starring Charlie Sheen

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Barry and Mindys Wedding
programme.desc: Chandler becomes enamoured with a woman he meets on the internet, and the subject of children proves a thorny one for Monica and Richard. Rachel relives the ordeal of her failed wedding day while serving as bridesmaid at her former fiances ceremony. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Princess Leia Fantasy
programme.desc: Ross foolishly lets Rachel in on his most secret sexual fantasy, while Phoebe consoles a heartbroken Monica and Chandler gets involved with an old flame whom Joey cannot stand. David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston star

programme.title: Whos Doing the Dishes?
programme.desc: Comedian Rowland Rivron puts on a dinner party at his home as he plays mystery host to four strangers. Presented by Brian McFadden

programme.title: Live Six Nations Under-20s
programme.desc: France v England (Kick-off 5.45pm). Coverage of the match from the fifth and final round of fixtures, which takes place at Stade Marcel-Deflandre in La Rochelle. France won both of their previous home matches in this years competition, including a 50-21 victory over Ireland in week one, and a 32-17 triumph against Italy in round three

programme.title: Posh Pawn
programme.desc: Prestige Pawnbrokers boss James Constantinou and the team receive a visit from a former Chelsea footballer who has brought along some expensive watches. James is also put to the test when asked to evaluate a hovercraft from a Bond film, and an unusual painting of Saddam Hussein causes a stir in the office. Also, theres a big surprise for a mother looking to sell some spectacular jewellery to help her sons business venture

programme.title: Sam and Billie: Sister Act
programme.desc: The results of biological age testing reveal shocking news, Sam heads to LA on a glamorous work trip, and the sisters let their hair down at an Usher concert

programme.title: Six Nations Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the final round of matches, which featured Ireland v Scotland at Aviva Stadium, Wales v Italy at Principality Stadium, and France v England at Stade de France

programme.title: The Claudia Winkleman Show
programme.desc: From Strictly to the sofa, Claudia kicks off her chat show which promises Hollywood actors, the best of British and comedy stars - all put at their ease by the hosts trademark warmth, charm and humour. Her first guests are Hollywood star and musician Jeff Goldblum, actress Vanessa Williams, comedy icon Jennifer Saunders and funnyman Tom Allen

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The host returns with a roster of guests including Hollywood stars Dwayne Johnson and Emily Blunt, who are appearing together in true-life sports drama The Smashing Machine. Oscar-winning actor and writer Matthew McConaughey chats about his survival thriller The Lost Bus, and James Norton discusses his role in Steven Knights new period succession drama House of Guinness. Plus, singer-songwriter RAYE chats and performs her new single Where Is My Husband!

programme.title: Iain Stirlings CelebAbility
programme.desc: Scarlett Moffat leads a group of three friends looking to win a slew of prizes by defeating Alex George, Maisie Smith, the Vivienne and Dane Baptiste in a series of silly games

programme.title: Skin AandE
programme.desc: Life within a specialist clinic, where a team of top dermatologists treats a range of skin conditions for patients who often havent been able to get treatment on the NHS

programme.title: The Jonathan Ross Show: Special Guests
programme.desc: A look back at some of the most memorable moments from recent series of the talk show. Amongst the guests featured are Oprah Winfrey, Boris Johnson, Sandra Bullock, Tom Hanks, One Direction, Michael McIntyre, Dame Joan Collins, Big Narstie, Danny Dyer, James Corden, Carrie Fisher, Russell Howard and Colin Farrell

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The history of modern-day mega structures, revealing that behind every seemingly impossible marvel of modern engineering is a cast of historic trailblazers

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as contestants Lisa, Maggie, Bart and Marge pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as Steve from Christchurch, Lloyd from Tenby, Chris from Salisbury and Jackie from Aylesbury take on one of the Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: How to Lose Weight Well
programme.sub-title: From the Midwifes Diet to the Athletes Diet
programme.desc: Xand van Tulleken and Helen Lawal oversee proceedings as three more pairs road test some of the most popular and talked about diets. Newlyweds Steven and Eamonn have eight days to trim down ahead of their holiday, friends Valetta and Paulette go on six-week diets to slim before their friends wedding in the sun, and drinking buddies Sian and Keighlee want to lose weight for a girls holiday in four months time. Xand investigates whether peoples hormones can make them fat, and Helen examines whether knitting can lead to weight loss

programme.title: Unbeatable
programme.desc: Over three rounds, contestants Maureen, Matt, Marisa and Stefan vie to find the single unbeatable answer and streak ahead of the rest to make the final where they can win a cash prize. General knowledge quiz, hosted by Jason Manford

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: Three suitors in Manchester hope to win the affections of vintage clothes fan Tanya

programme.title: Champions: Full Gallop
programme.desc: Documentary following the drama on and off the racetrack as jockeys, trainers, owners and horses battle to become Champions of Jumps season. In the first episode, its Boxing Day at Kempton and the horses line up for the historic big money King George VI chase, one of the most prestigious jump races of the entire season

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: On a remote lake in Malaysia, two men mysteriously vanish - just hours apart. Amid rumours that a giant fish is on the loose, biologist and monster-hunter Jeremy Wade sets out to track down the possible culprit. Could the killer be an interloper from South America, as reports suggest, or is there a home-grown predator that fits the bill? A trail of evidence leads Jeremy into an ancient rainforest, where an old adversary lies in wait. More than just a beast with a gruesome rap sheet, its also the one river monster that he has thus far failed to catch

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts as Julie from Enfield, Cameron from Sheffield, Sue from Leeds and Darran from Glasgow come together in the hope that they can take on a Chaser as a team and leave with thousands of pounds

programme.title: Heathrow: Britains Busiest Airport
programme.desc: The documentary going behind the scenes of the London airport returns for a fifth season. Inside the terminal, seasoned pro Demi dishes out deals for delayed passengers, while outside on the airfield, Ian is on the runway as it goes into lockdown with a full armed police presence. For the first time this series, viewers will also see the work of the Border Forces canine drugs detection team - Rachel and her dog Cole, who in his career has intercepted more than £1million worth of class-A contraband. Narrated by Julie Walters

programme.title: League of Ireland
programme.desc: Galway United v Waterford (Kick-off 8.00pm). Coverage of the SSE Airtricity Mens Premier Division match from Eamonn Deacy Park. The four meetings between these teams last season saw Waterford triumph on two occasions, while Galway won once and the other contest ended in a stalemate, but the one victory that The Tribesmen registered did come at this ground when they won 4-2 last July

programme.title: Love Island USA
programme.desc: The American version of the relationship-based reality show, in which singletons compete to pair off while living in a villa

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing: LA
programme.desc: Two brokers, one house - who can bring home the buyer as Altman and Tracy go head-to-head over the sale of a historic property?

programme.title: You and Me
programme.desc: When Ben and aspiring actress Emma meet through work, they get closer when they find they share similar transformative experiences of grief

programme.title: Tell Me Everything
programme.desc: Regan struggles with the loss of control when her nans care is taken over by a professional. The gang goes to a careers fair where Neve sees Marcus in a new light
